        • conflict-affected settings 2 -- regions experiencing or recovering from armed conflict or civil unrest
        • climate fragility 2 -- vulnerability of systems to climate-related stresses and shocks
        • human security 3 -- protection of individuals from threats to their safety and wellbeing
      • Climate-Conflict Nexus -- Linkages between climate change, conflict, and security
        • climate-conflict nexus 12 -- the interconnected relationship between climate change impacts and violent conflict emergence
        • climate-peace-security nexus 5 -- integrated framework addressing interconnected climate, peace and security challenges
        • climate security 16 -- framework addressing security risks arising from climate change impacts
        • herder-farmer conflict 3 -- violent conflict between nomadic herders and settled agricultural communities over land and resources
        • farmer-herder conflict 1 -- disputes between agricultural and pastoral communities over land and resource use
        • conflict classification 1 -- systematic categorization of different types of violence and conflict
        • conflict diffusion analysis 1 -- measurement of geographic spread of violence and conflict
        • political violence analysis 1 -- systematic study of organized violence and its impacts on communities
        • climate-conflict analysis 1 -- analytical approach to measure connections between climate change and conflict occurrence
      • Displacement and Migration -- Forced displacement, climate-induced migration, and related policies
        • forced displacement 4 -- involuntary movement of people due to conflict, persecution, or environmental factors
        • displacement 2 -- forced movement of people from their homes due to conflict, climate, or economic factors
        • climate-displacement nexus 4 -- relationship between climate change impacts and human displacement
        • climate-induced displacement 4 -- forced migration resulting from climate change impacts and extreme weather events
        • labor migration 5 -- movement of people for employment opportunities, often from rural to urban areas or abroad
        • migration policy 1 -- government strategies and frameworks for managing human mobility
        • migration monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking and analysis of population movement patterns
        • managed resettlement 1 -- planned relocation of communities away from climate hazards
      • Peacebuilding and Environmental Security -- Peacebuilding approaches and environmental dimensions of conflict
        • environmental peacebuilding 2 -- use of environmental cooperation to promote peace and social cohesion in post-conflict areas
        • resource scarcity 3 -- insufficient availability of natural resources like water, land, or pasture
    • Human Wellbeing and Livelihoods -- Dimensions of human wellbeing, livelihoods, and quality of life in agricultural contexts
      • Violence and Safety -- Gender-based violence and intimate partner violence
        • gender-based violence 6 -- violence directed against individuals based on their gender
        • intimate partner violence 3 -- physical, sexual, or psychological harm by current or former intimate partners
      • Livelihoods and Wellbeing -- Livelihood improvement and wellbeing outcomes
        • livelihood improvement 3 -- enhancement of income, employment, and economic opportunities for communities
        • livelihood capitals 1 -- assets and resources that individuals and households use to build their livelihoods
        • livelihood cooperation 1 -- collaborative strategies between communities to enhance economic resilience
        • coping strategies 3 -- actions taken by households to manage economic or environmental stress
        • resilience 4 -- ability of households or systems to withstand and recover from shocks and stresses
        • mental health impacts 2 -- psychological consequences of climate change and displacement on affected populations
        • subjective resilience 2 -- household-perceived capacity to anticipate, withstand, recover from, and adapt to hazards
      • Miscellaneous Wellbeing Concepts -- Additional concepts related to human wellbeing and social dimensions
        • human capital development 1 -- investment in education, skills, and health to increase productivity
        • collective action 2 -- coordinated community efforts to address shared challenges
        • civil society engagement 2 -- involvement of non-governmental organizations and community groups in policy and development processes
        • community engagement 2 -- participatory processes involving local stakeholders in development initiatives
        • social valuation 1 -- assessment of community perceptions and willingness to adopt practices
        • traditional knowledge systems 2 -- indigenous practices and understanding passed through generations
        • indigenous food systems 1 -- traditional food production and consumption practices of local communities
        • cultural heritage preservation 1 -- maintenance of traditional agricultural practices and genetic resources
        • food systems leadership 2 -- leadership development and behaviors within agricultural and food system contexts
        • localization 1 -- shifting leadership and decision-making to local actors in development interventions
  • Capacity Development, Extension, and Knowledge Systems -- Covers training, extension services, knowledge sharing, and institutional capacity building for agricultural development
    • Agricultural Extension and Advisory Services -- Extension services, farmer field demonstrations, digital advisory tools, and community-based extension approaches
      • Extension Approaches and Methods -- Core extension delivery methods and approaches
        • agricultural extension 5 -- knowledge transfer system connecting research to farmers through advisory services
        • extension services 3 -- educational and advisory services that transfer knowledge and technologies to farmers
        • farmer-led extension 2 -- agricultural advisory systems driven by peer-to-peer knowledge sharing among farmers
        • community-based extension 1 -- extension service delivery model using local community members as agents
        • farmer field demonstrations 2 -- on-farm testing and showcasing of improved agricultural practices
        • farmer-led demonstration plots 3 -- on-farm trials managed by farmers for peer-to-peer learning and technology validation
        • traditional extension 1 -- conventional top-down method of delivering agricultural information to farmers
        • radio-based extension 1 -- using radio broadcasts to deliver agricultural information and climate advisories
        • mobile-based extension 1 -- delivering agricultural advisory services through mobile phone platforms
        • participatory extension 2 -- collaborative method of delivering agricultural knowledge involving farmer participation
        • community-driven extension 1 -- extension services led and owned by local communities rather than external agencies
        • farmer-to-farmer learning 1 -- peer-to-peer knowledge exchange methods that validate farmers as sources of innovation
        • demonstration plot training 1 -- hands-on learning approach using field demonstrations to transfer technology
        • last-mile delivery 2 -- reaching end users through local agent networks and service providers
        • decentralized service delivery 1 -- distribution of services through local providers rather than centralized institutions
        • trust in extension systems 1 -- farmer confidence and reliance on agricultural advisory services and information sources
      • Digital Advisory and Extension Services -- Digital tools and platforms for agricultural advisory and extension
        • digital advisory services 22 -- technology-enabled platforms providing agricultural guidance and recommendations to farmers
        • digital extension 13 -- delivery of agricultural advisory services through digital platforms and mobile applications
        • digital extension platforms 5 -- technology-enabled systems for delivering agricultural advisory services to farmers
        • digital extension services 2 -- technology-enabled platforms for delivering agricultural advisory and information services to farmers
        • digital extension integration 2 -- combining digital tools with traditional extension services for farmer outreach
        • digital agricultural extension 3 -- technology-enabled delivery of agricultural advisory services and information to farmers
        • digital agro-advisory services 4 -- technology-enabled platforms delivering agricultural guidance and recommendations to farmers
        • digital advisory platforms 5 -- technology-based systems for delivering agricultural and climate advisories
        • digital agricultural advisory 2 -- technology-enabled extension services delivering agricultural recommendations
        • digital agricultural advisory services 1 -- technology-enabled platforms providing agricultural information and support to farmers
        • ai-driven agricultural extension 4 -- use of artificial intelligence to deliver agricultural advice and information to farmers
        • digital advisories 3 -- technology-based platforms delivering agricultural guidance to farmers
        • multimodal advisory services 1 -- agricultural extension using multiple communication channels and formats
        • bundled advisory services 3 -- integrated delivery of multiple agricultural services including advisories, inputs, credit, and insurance
        • climate advisory services 3 -- information systems providing weather and climate guidance for agricultural decision-making
        • digital climate advisory services 3 -- technology-enabled platforms providing climate information and agricultural guidance to farmers
        • gender-responsive agricultural advisories 3 -- agricultural guidance systems designed to address different needs and constraints of men and women farmers
        • gender-responsive extension services 2 -- agricultural advisory services designed to address specific needs and constraints of different genders
        • livestock health extension 2 -- delivery of animal health knowledge and services to livestock producers
        • interactive voice response 1 -- technology that allows interaction with computer systems through voice commands and responses
        • mobile application 1 -- software platform designed for mobile devices to deliver services or information
      • Agroclimatic Advisory Services -- Climate and weather information services for farmers
        • agroclimatic information services 7 -- platforms providing weather and climate data for agricultural decision-making
        • agro-climatic bulletin 5 -- weather-based agricultural advisory system providing farmers with climate information for decision-making
        • agroclimatic forecasting 3 -- prediction of weather and climate conditions relevant to agricultural planning
        • agroclimatic intelligence 1 -- integration of climate data, ai and agricultural knowledge for decision support
        • agroclimatic monitoring 3 -- systematic observation and tracking of climate conditions affecting agricultural production
        • agro-advisories 1 -- agricultural advice services based on weather and climate information
        • agro-advisory provision 1 -- services providing agricultural guidance and recommendations to farmers
        • weather-informed agro-advisories 1 -- agricultural guidance services that incorporate weather forecast data for farming decisions
        • forecast-based advisory 1 -- decision support system using weather forecasts to guide agricultural practices
        • bundled cis and csa 5 -- integrated packages combining climate information with smart agriculture practices
        • site-specific fertilizer advisory 3 -- precision nutrient management recommendations based on landscape and soil conditions
        • site-specific recommendations 5 -- tailored agricultural advice based on local conditions and farmer circumstances
    • Training and Capacity Building -- Capacity building programs, training of trainers, curriculum development, and skills development initiatives
      • Core Capacity Building -- Foundational capacity building and training programs
        • capacity building 262 -- systematic development of skills and knowledge among target beneficiaries
        • capacity development 26 -- building skills and knowledge of individuals and organizations
        • capacity strengthening 8 -- systematic development of technical and organizational abilities to implement and scale innovations
        • capacity building training 4 -- structured educational intervention to develop skills and knowledge among target participants
        • capacity development training 2 -- structured learning interventions to enhance skills and knowledge of individuals or organizations
        • capacity sharing 3 -- collaborative exchange of skills, knowledge, and resources between institutions
        • training of trainers 18 -- capacity building approach that prepares participants to train others
        • stakeholder training 7 -- educational activities designed to improve stakeholder knowledge and skills
        • extension training 4 -- capacity building programs for agricultural extension workers to improve farmer outreach
        • technical assistance 7 -- expert support to strengthen implementation capacity
        • human capital development 1 -- investment in education, skills, and health to increase productivity
      • Curriculum and Skills Development -- Curriculum design, skills training, and specialized training programs
        • curriculum development 3 -- systematic design and creation of educational programs and materials
        • curriculum integration 6 -- incorporation of new knowledge and practices into educational programs
        • curriculum institutionalization 1 -- formal integration of interdisciplinary courses into university academic programs
        • financial literacy training 5 -- educational programs teaching budgeting, savings, credit management, and investment decision-making skills
        • financial management training 1 -- educational programs to develop business financial skills and practices
        • agribusiness training 3 -- education combining agricultural production with business management skills
        • advocacy training 4 -- educational programs to develop skills for promoting causes and influencing policy
        • food safety training 1 -- education programs to improve food handling and safety practices
        • nutrition education 2 -- structured learning programs to improve dietary knowledge and behavior
        • genomics training 1 -- capacity building in genetic analysis techniques for crop improvement and breeding programs
        • women's business skills training 1 -- educational programs designed to develop entrepreneurial and business management capabilities among women
        • training needs assessment 2 -- systematic approach to identify knowledge and skill gaps for targeted capacity building
      • Virtual and Digital Learning -- Online, virtual, and digital training modalities
        • virtual training 4 -- remote delivery of educational content and skills development
        • virtual learning 2 -- remote education delivery using digital technologies
        • e-learning 1 -- digital educational delivery method using online platforms and resources
        • mobile phone-delivered training 1 -- educational content delivered through automated phone calls or mobile platforms
        • game-based learning 1 -- structured experiential learning using games to develop understanding and problem-solving skills
        • gamification 2 -- applying game design elements to non-game contexts to enhance engagement
        • edutainment 1 -- educational content delivery through entertainment media to engage and inform audiences
      • Mentorship and Accompaniment -- Mentorship, coaching, and technical accompaniment programs
        • mentorship program 1 -- structured learning relationship between experienced professionals and developing practitioners
        • technical accompaniment 1 -- ongoing technical support and capacity building for farmers and extension agents
        • validation workshops 3 -- participatory sessions to verify and confirm research findings
        • knowledge exchange sessions 1 -- interactive platforms for sharing and learning evidence-based practices
    • Knowledge Management and Learning -- Knowledge exchange, peer learning, participatory learning, knowledge platforms, and communities of practice
      • Knowledge Exchange and Sharing -- Mechanisms for sharing and disseminating knowledge
        • knowledge exchange 4 -- systematic sharing and transfer of information and expertise between stakeholders
        • knowledge sharing 1 -- exchange of information and expertise among stakeholders
        • knowledge dissemination 3 -- systematic sharing of research findings and expertise across communities
        • knowledge diffusion 1 -- spread of agricultural information and practices through farmer networks
        • technology dissemination 2 -- process of spreading improved agricultural technologies to farmers
        • technology transfer 6 -- process of moving innovations from research to practical application
        • technology diffusion 3 -- spread and adoption of new technologies across markets and users
        • south-south collaboration 2 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries
        • south-south cooperation 1 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries for mutual development
      • Peer and Experiential Learning -- Peer learning networks and experiential learning approaches
        • peer learning 3 -- knowledge exchange and skill development among individuals with similar experiences
        • peer learning networks 2 -- farmer-to-farmer knowledge sharing platforms for scaling innovations
        • experiential learning 5 -- educational approach using hands-on interactive experiences to build understanding
        • participatory learning 8 -- educational methodology where stakeholders actively engage in knowledge creation and sharing through collaborative activities
        • participatory learning methodology 2 -- educational approach that engages participants in dialogue and reflection to foster learning and behavior change
        • participatory action learning 1 -- collaborative approach integrating local knowledge with scientific methods
        • family-led learning 1 -- household-based approach to knowledge sharing and decision-making
        • community of practice 24 -- collaborative network for sharing knowledge and best practices among practitioners
      • Knowledge Platforms and Systems -- Digital and institutional platforms for knowledge management
        • knowledge platform 2 -- digital system for organizing, sharing and accessing information resources
        • knowledge management system 1 -- platform for organizing and sharing information and experiences
        • decision support systems 11 -- computer-based tools providing information to aid decision-making
        • decision-support tools 4 -- digital platforms and frameworks that assist in agricultural decision-making
        • digital decision-support tools 1 -- technology platforms that provide data-driven recommendations for agricultural management
        • evidence-based decision support 3 -- agricultural advisory systems using scientific data to guide farmer decisions
        • digital platforms 6 -- technology-based systems for information sharing and service delivery
        • digital public infrastructure 1 -- shared digital platforms and protocols that enable scalable service delivery
        • agricultural data hubs 2 -- centralized platforms for organizing and sharing agricultural information
      • Institutional Learning and Adaptive Management -- Organizational learning, adaptive management, and monitoring frameworks
        • institutional learning 1 -- systematic knowledge acquisition and application within organizations
        • adaptive management 4 -- iterative management approach that adjusts based on learning and feedback
        • monitoring and evaluation 8 -- systematic assessment of intervention implementation and outcomes
        • monitoring and evaluation frameworks 3 -- structured approaches to measure and assess intervention outcomes
        • theory of change 4 -- comprehensive description of how and why desired change is expected to happen
        • systems thinking 2 -- holistic approach to understanding complex problems by examining interconnections and leverage points
        • systems approach 3 -- holistic methodology analyzing interconnected components and feedback loops
        • impact evaluation 4 -- systematic assessment of changes caused by development interventions
        • impact assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects on outcomes
        • evidence gap mapping 4 -- systematic methodology to identify and visualize gaps in research evidence
        • participatory monitoring and evaluation 3 -- community-led approach to tracking progress and assessing outcomes using locally relevant indicators
      • Traditional and Indigenous Knowledge -- Traditional knowledge systems and indigenous knowledge integration
        • traditional knowledge systems 2 -- indigenous practices and understanding passed through generations
        • traditional ecological knowledge 1 -- indigenous knowledge systems about environmental relationships and resource management
        • indigenous food systems 1 -- traditional food production and consumption practices of local communities
    • Participatory Research and Co-Design -- Participatory research methods, co-design, citizen science, participatory action research, and co-production of knowledge
      • Participatory Research Methods -- Core participatory research approaches and methods
        • participatory research 32 -- research approach involving stakeholders as active participants in knowledge generation
        • participatory approach 13 -- research and development methods involving stakeholder participation
        • participatory methods 5 -- research approaches involving active participation of study subjects
        • participatory methodology 2 -- research approach that actively involves community members in the design and implementation process
        • participatory action research 1 -- collaborative research approach involving stakeholders in problem-solving
        • participatory rural appraisal 1 -- community-based research method using local knowledge and participation
        • participatory diagnosis 5 -- collaborative assessment of needs and priorities involving stakeholders
        • participatory assessment 1 -- evaluation approach involving stakeholder participation in research and development
        • participatory evaluation 5 -- research approach involving farmers and stakeholders in assessment of technologies
        • participatory framework 1 -- structured approach involving multiple stakeholders in decision-making processes
        • participatory indicator selection 1 -- collaborative process for developing context-specific performance measures
        • participatory scenario development 1 -- collaborative process for creating future scenarios with stakeholder input
        • participatory foresight 1 -- collaborative approach to exploring and planning for future scenarios
        • participatory risk mapping 1 -- collaborative approach involving experts to identify climate-related risks and develop adaptation plans
        • participatory mapping 7 -- collaborative approach involving farmers in adaptation planning and field-level solutions
        • participatory geographic information systems 1 -- community-based mapping approach integrating local knowledge with GIS technology
        • participatory capacity building 2 -- collaborative learning processes that strengthen stakeholder skills through active engagement
        • village-led action research 1 -- community-driven research approach where locals identify and address challenges
        • action research 1 -- research approach combining investigation with direct action for social change
      • Co-Design and Co-Production -- Co-design, co-creation, and co-production of knowledge and solutions
        • co-design 17 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders in innovation creation
        • co-creation 4 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders
        • co-production 2 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders
        • co-production of knowledge 1 -- collaborative research approach involving communities in knowledge generation
        • human-centered design 19 -- participatory design approach that prioritizes user needs and experiences in technology development
        • user-centered design 3 -- design approach that prioritizes end-user needs and experiences throughout development
        • participatory co-design 3 -- collaborative approach involving stakeholders in designing research and interventions
        • stakeholder co-design 2 -- collaborative design process involving all relevant parties in solution development
        • participatory design 2 -- collaborative approach involving end-users in the design and development process
        • participatory product design 1 -- collaborative approach involving stakeholders in identifying market segments and prioritizing traits for product development
        • participatory technology development 1 -- collaborative approach involving stakeholders in designing and developing technologies
        • co-creation approach 1 -- collaborative development process involving community members as partners
        • agroforestry co-design 1 -- collaborative process to design diversified tree-crop systems aligned with producer needs
        • usability testing 2 -- evaluation of user interface design through task-based user feedback
      • Citizen Science and Community-Based Research -- Citizen science, community-based observation, and participatory climate services
        • citizen science 12 -- scientific research conducted by members of the general public in collaboration with professional scientists
        • community-based climate observation 3 -- local monitoring of climate variables by community members to support decision-making and early warning
        • participatory climate services 8 -- collaborative approach to developing and delivering climate information that involves end-users in the design and implementation process
        • crowdsourcing 1 -- engaging large groups to collect data or perform tasks using technology
        • triadic comparisons of technology options 15 -- research approach to decentralize technology evaluation using large numbers of participants for higher external validity
        • tricot approach 3 -- triadic comparison method for on-farm testing where farmers rank three technologies
        • triadic comparison of technologies 2 -- participatory evaluation method where farmers compare three technologies simultaneously
        • pioneer positive deviance 8 -- approach that identifies and supports farmers already developing innovative local solutions
        • positive deviance approach 3 -- identifying and learning from individuals or groups with better outcomes despite similar constraints
        • positive deviance 1 -- approach identifying successful practices among those facing similar challenges
      • Participatory Breeding and Variety Selection -- Farmer-led and participatory approaches to crop improvement
        • participatory breeding 11 -- involving farmers in variety selection and development process
        • participatory variety selection 16 -- farmer-involved process for evaluating and selecting crop varieties
        • participatory varietal selection 4 -- farmer involvement in testing and selecting new crop varieties
        • participatory cultivar selection 2 -- farmer involvement in variety evaluation and selection before commercial release
        • community-based breeding programs 3 -- participatory genetic improvement schemes involving farmers in design and implementation
        • community-based breeding 2 -- participatory genetic improvement programs managed by farmers
        • on-farm testing 16 -- evaluating varieties under actual farmer field conditions
        • on-farm verification 1 -- testing crop varieties under actual farmer conditions to validate performance
        • on-farm trials 1 -- field research conducted on farmers' own land to test innovations under real conditions
        • farmer-led innovation 2 -- innovation processes initiated and driven by farmers themselves
        • demand-driven breeding 3 -- breeding programs guided by end-user needs and market requirements
        • demand-led breeding 1 -- crop improvement driven by market and farmer requirements
        • target product profiles 13 -- systematic documentation of desired crop characteristics based on market needs
        • target product profile development 1 -- systematic definition of desired characteristics for breeding targets
        • product profile development 3 -- defining target traits and characteristics for specific market segments
        • trait preferences 3 -- farmer and stakeholder preferences for specific crop characteristics
        • varietal demonstrations 2 -- field trials showcasing performance of different crop varieties to farmers
        • variety demonstration 1 -- field-based showcasing of crop varieties to promote adoption
      • Transdisciplinary and Systems Research -- Interdisciplinary and transdisciplinary research approaches
        • transdisciplinary research 1 -- problem-focused research approach that integrates knowledge from multiple disciplines and stakeholders
        • transdisciplinary approaches 1 -- research and intervention methods that integrate multiple disciplines and stakeholder perspectives
        • interdisciplinary research 3 -- research approach combining multiple scientific disciplines to address complex problems
        • systems-based theory of change 1 -- impact planning approach incorporating feedback loops and system dynamics
        • mixed-methods approach 4 -- research design combining quantitative and qualitative data collection techniques
        • living lab 6 -- collaborative innovation platform where stakeholders co-create and test solutions in real-world settings
        • agroecosystem living labs 2 -- collaborative research approach engaging farmers and communities to test climate-smart practices in real farming systems
      • Participatory Governance and Rangeland Management -- Participatory governance and community-based natural resource management
        • participatory governance 10 -- inclusive decision-making processes involving multiple stakeholders
        • participatory rangeland management 10 -- community-led approach to managing rangeland resources through stakeholder engagement and collaborative decision-making
        • community-based management 6 -- natural resource management approach led by local communities
        • community-based resource management 2 -- participatory strategy where local communities manage their natural resources
        • community-led initiatives 2 -- locally driven programs managed by community members
        • community-led innovation 1 -- innovation processes initiated and controlled by local communities
        • community engagement 2 -- participatory processes involving local stakeholders in development initiatives
        • stakeholder engagement 16 -- systematic involvement of relevant parties in decision-making processes
        • stakeholder consultation 4 -- structured engagement with relevant parties to gather input and build consensus
        • stakeholder dialogue 3 -- structured multi-party discussions to address complex resource management challenges
        • stakeholder mapping 1 -- systematic identification and categorization of relevant actors and their relationships
        • civil society engagement 2 -- involvement of non-governmental organizations and community groups in policy and development processes
        • collective action 2 -- coordinated community efforts to address shared challenges
    • Innovation Systems and Scaling -- Innovation platforms, scaling strategies, innovation hubs, technology adoption, and scaling readiness frameworks
      • Innovation Platforms and Networks -- Multi-stakeholder innovation platforms and collaborative networks
        • innovation platforms 5 -- multi-stakeholder forums for collaborative problem-solving and knowledge sharing
        • innovation networks 7 -- collaborative platforms connecting multiple actors to facilitate knowledge exchange and scaling
        • innovation hubs 2 -- territorial platforms that connect actors, capacities, and knowledge for technology validation and scaling
        • multi-stakeholder platforms 33 -- collaborative spaces bringing together diverse actors for innovation and change
        • multistakeholder platforms 5 -- collaborative mechanisms bringing together diverse actors to address common challenges
        • multi-stakeholder engagement 9 -- collaborative processes involving diverse actors including farmers, government, researchers, and private sector
        • multi-stakeholder collaboration 5 -- coordinated engagement among diverse organizations and sectors toward common goals
        • multi-stakeholder partnership 4 -- collaborative arrangements involving diverse actors from different sectors
        • multistakeholder partnerships 2 -- collaborative arrangements involving diverse actors across agricultural value chains
        • multistakeholder networks 2 -- collaborative structures involving diverse actors to coordinate knowledge sharing and scaling
        • public-private partnerships 20 -- collaborative arrangements between government and private sector entities
        • territorial innovation networks 2 -- collaborative networks linking research, extension and farmers across geographic territories
        • agricultural innovation systems 2 -- networks of organizations, policies, and processes that generate, adapt, and diffuse agricultural technologies
        • hub model 3 -- territorial multistakeholder platforms integrating research, innovation and extension
        • district working groups 2 -- collaborative governance structures for coordinated natural resource management
        • inter-institutional coordination 3 -- collaborative arrangements between different organizations for common goals
        • institutional coordination 4 -- alignment and collaboration among organizations and agencies
        • multisectoral collaboration 3 -- coordination across different sectors and disciplines
      • Scaling Strategies and Frameworks -- Approaches and frameworks for scaling agricultural innovations
        • scaling for impact 18 -- systematic approach to expanding successful innovations to achieve broader development outcomes
        • scaling pathways 12 -- systematic approaches to expand adoption of innovations
        • scaling strategies 5 -- systematic methods for expanding successful interventions to broader populations
        • scaling framework 7 -- systematic approach for expanding successful interventions to broader contexts
        • scaling readiness 5 -- systematic preparation of innovations for widespread adoption and implementation
        • scaling readiness assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting the scaling of innovations
        • scaling assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting innovation adoption and diffusion
        • scaling 4 -- process of expanding successful innovations or interventions to reach broader populations or geographic areas
        • innovation scaling 6 -- process of expanding successful agricultural innovations to broader adoption
        • inclusive scaling 4 -- strategy for expanding improved varieties that ensures broad access across different farm types and socioeconomic levels
        • adaptive scaling 2 -- approach to scaling innovations that adapts to local contexts and market conditions
        • responsible scaling 2 -- expansion of innovations while anticipating and mitigating social and environmental risks
        • producer-led scaling 4 -- farmer-driven expansion of successful practices through peer-to-peer learning
        • participatory scaling 1 -- collaborative approach to expanding successful interventions through stakeholder engagement
        • selective scaling 1 -- targeted expansion strategy focusing on specific contexts or beneficiary groups for improved varieties
        • gender-responsive scaling 1 -- scaling strategies that integrate gender considerations and address gendered barriers
        • scaling champions 2 -- trusted individuals who coordinate actors and support innovation adoption
        • scaling hubs 1 -- regional platforms that coordinate partnerships and knowledge sharing for agricultural innovation adoption
        • scaling fund 1 -- financial mechanism supporting innovation expansion and market penetration
        • scaling scan tool 1 -- assessment framework to evaluate innovation scalability potential
        • science of scaling 1 -- evidence-based understanding of how innovations achieve widespread adoption and impact
      • Technology Adoption and Diffusion -- Processes and factors influencing technology adoption
        • technology adoption 9 -- process by which farmers accept and implement new agricultural technologies or practices
        • technology adoption dynamics 2 -- patterns of farmer uptake and abandonment of agricultural innovations
        • adoption dynamics 1 -- patterns of technology uptake including initial use, consistent adoption, dis-adoption, and non-adoption
        • varietal adoption 8 -- process by which farmers select and use new crop varieties
        • improved seed adoption 2 -- process by which farmers take up and use enhanced crop varieties
        • innovation bundling 5 -- integrating technical, digital and institutional solutions to address interconnected challenges
        • innovation package 2 -- bundled set of technologies, practices and services designed to achieve specific outcomes
        • bundled innovations 2 -- integrated packages combining multiple complementary technologies and practices
        • socio-technical innovation bundles 4 -- integrated packages combining technological innovations with social interventions
        • whole-farm innovation bundles 3 -- integrated packages of complementary technologies and practices for entire farming systems
        • bundled csa practices 1 -- integrated packages of climate-smart agricultural interventions implemented at scale
        • bundled climate-smart solutions 3 -- integrated package of climate adaptation and mitigation practices for agriculture
        • integrated production bundle 4 -- coherent package of agronomic practices, inputs, and management recommendations for specific crops
        • technology bundling 1 -- integrated package of complementary technologies and services for scaling
        • innovation validation 1 -- systematic testing of prototypes and assumptions with real users before full implementation
        • responsible innovation 2 -- innovation processes that consider ethical, social, and environmental implications
      • Business Development and Incubation -- Business incubation, acceleration, and enterprise development for agricultural innovation
        • business incubation 4 -- support system for developing and accelerating new enterprises
        • accelerator programs 1 -- structured support programs for scaling agricultural innovations and businesses
        • agribusiness acceleration 3 -- structured support to help agricultural enterprises scale and access markets
        • business model development 8 -- creation of sustainable commercial frameworks for technology adoption
        • inclusive business models 3 -- commercial strategies ensuring access to services for smallholder farmers and marginalized groups
        • sustainable business model 1 -- commercial framework balancing economic viability with environmental and social benefits
        • business development services 2 -- support services to strengthen enterprise capacity and growth
        • investment readiness 2 -- preparation of enterprises for attracting investment funding
        • bankable project development 1 -- preparation of investment-ready proposals that meet funding institution requirements
        • bankable investment projects 1 -- development projects structured to meet financial institution lending criteria
        • business plan development 1 -- structured process of creating comprehensive business strategies and financial projections
        • youth entrepreneurship 2 -- support for business development and job creation among young people
        • micro small medium enterprises 4 -- small-scale business entities that form the backbone of many developing economies
        • cooperative development 3 -- building organizational capacity and governance structures for farmer collective action
        • agroecological business modeling 1 -- development of sustainable business models based on ecological principles
      • Foresight and Strategic Planning -- Strategic foresight, vision-to-action, and planning tools for innovation systems
        • strategic foresight 2 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios to inform current decisions
        • foresight analysis 1 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios for strategic planning
        • food systems foresight 1 -- strategic planning methodology for anticipating future food system changes
        • vision-to-action process 2 -- structured community planning approach to translate environmental goals into actionable farming plans
        • vision-to-action approach 2 -- participatory process to translate shared community visions into concrete, measurable actions
        • vision-to-action mapping 2 -- structured process for translating strategic visions into concrete action plans
        • theory of change 4 -- comprehensive description of how and why desired change is expected to happen
        • stage-gate framework 1 -- structured decision-making process with defined milestones and evaluation criteria
        • causal loop diagrams 1 -- systems thinking tool to map interconnected causes and effects
        • causal chain analysis 1 -- approach linking climate shocks, adaptive actions, and outcomes through explicit causal pathways
        • systems science 1 -- interdisciplinary study of complex systems and their emergent properties
    • Gender, Social Inclusion, and Empowerment -- Gender-transformative approaches, social inclusion, and empowerment in agricultural knowledge systems
      • Gender-Transformative Approaches -- Gender mainstreaming and transformative approaches in agricultural programs
        • gender transformative approaches 29 -- interventions that address root causes of gender inequality and transform power relations
        • gender transformative research 7 -- research approaches that challenge and transform underlying causes of gender inequalities
        • gender-transformative intervention 3 -- development strategies that address structural gender inequalities and power dynamics
        • gender mainstreaming 8 -- systematic integration of gender perspectives into policies and programs
        • gender-responsive approaches 7 -- interventions that acknowledge and address different needs and constraints of men and women
        • gender-responsive programming 6 -- development interventions addressing gender inequalities and promoting inclusion
        • gender-responsive research 2 -- research design that considers differential impacts and needs of men and women
        • gender-responsive interventions 2 -- programs designed to address differential impacts across gender lines
        • gender-responsive services 2 -- services designed to address differential needs and barriers faced by different genders
        • gender-responsive solutions 3 -- interventions designed to address differential impacts and needs by gender
        • gender-responsive delivery 1 -- agricultural services designed to address gender-specific needs
        • gender-responsive technical assistance 1 -- support services designed to address specific needs and barriers faced by different genders
        • gender-responsive adaptation 1 -- climate adaptation strategies that address differential impacts and needs by gender
        • gender-responsive policy 2 -- policy framework that integrates gender equality considerations into planning and implementation
        • gender-responsive budgeting 2 -- budget analysis and allocation considering differential gender impacts
        • gender-responsive business planning 1 -- business strategy development incorporating gender equity and inclusion principles
        • gender-responsive scaling 1 -- scaling strategies that integrate gender considerations and address gendered barriers
        • gender-responsive artificial intelligence 1 -- ai systems designed to recognize and mitigate gender biases in service delivery
        • gender-responsive livestock breeding 1 -- breeding programs that consider gender dynamics in livestock management and benefits
        • gender-responsive agricultural advisories 3 -- agricultural guidance systems designed to address different needs and constraints of men and women farmers
      • Gender Inclusion and Equity -- Gender inclusion, equity, and equality in agricultural development
        • gender and social inclusion 7 -- ensuring equitable participation and benefits across social groups
        • gender inclusion 5 -- ensuring equitable participation and benefits for all genders in development processes
        • gender integration 4 -- systematic incorporation of gender considerations into policies, programs, and research
        • gender equality 3 -- equal rights, opportunities and treatment regardless of gender
        • gender equity 3 -- fair treatment and opportunities for all genders in agricultural systems
        • gender equality social inclusion 3 -- ensuring equitable participation and benefits for all groups
        • gender equality and social inclusion 2 -- strategy to ensure equitable participation of marginalized groups
        • gender equality integration 1 -- systematic inclusion of gender considerations in development programs
        • gender-inclusive approaches 4 -- methods that ensure equitable participation and benefits for all genders
        • gender-inclusive strategies 1 -- interventions designed to address gender-based barriers and promote equal participation
        • gender-inclusive planning 1 -- incorporating gender equality and social inclusion considerations into development planning
        • gender-sensitive interventions 3 -- development interventions designed to address gender-specific needs and constraints
        • gender-sensitive programming 1 -- design and delivery of programs that consider and address gender-specific needs and impacts
        • gender-sensitive measurement 1 -- evaluation framework incorporating gender equality considerations
        • gender-sensitive agricultural interventions 3 -- agricultural programs that explicitly address gender roles and women's participation in farming activities
        • gender-inclusive water management 1 -- water governance approaches that ensure equitable participation of women in decision-making
      • Women's Empowerment and Leadership -- Women's empowerment, leadership development, and political participation
        • women's empowerment 15 -- process of increasing women's access to resources, decision-making power, and opportunities
        • women's empowerment in agriculture index 2 -- standardized tool for measuring women's empowerment in agricultural contexts
        • women's leadership development 3 -- capacity building initiatives focused on enhancing women's leadership skills and confidence
        • women's political participation 4 -- involvement of women in political processes and decision-making
        • empowerment 3 -- process of increasing capacity to make choices and transform those choices into actions
        • youth empowerment 2 -- strategies to engage and support young people in agricultural development
        • gender empowerment 4 -- process of increasing women's capacity to make strategic life choices
        • gender action learning system 1 -- participatory empowerment tool addressing gender inequities in development
      • Social Inclusion and Intersectionality -- Social inclusion, intersectionality, and equity in agricultural programs
        • social inclusion 2 -- ensuring marginalized groups have access to opportunities and services
        • intersectionality 2 -- analysis considering multiple overlapping social identities and systems of oppression
        • gender dynamics 2 -- patterns of interaction and power relations between genders
        • gender norms analysis 1 -- systematic examination of social expectations and roles that limit participation and decision-making
        • gender norms measurement 1 -- quantitative tools for assessing and tracking changes in gender-related social norms
        • social norms 2 -- shared expectations and rules that guide behavior within groups
        • social equity integration 3 -- ensuring marginalized groups have equal access to resources and decision-making in development programs
        • decolonial pedagogies 2 -- educational frameworks that challenge colonial knowledge systems and power structures
        • feminist political ecology 1 -- analytical framework examining gender, power, and environmental resource access
      • Behavior Change Communication -- Communication approaches for behavior change in agricultural and nutrition contexts
        • social behavior change communication 4 -- strategic communication approach to influence behaviors and social norms
        • behavioral change communication 2 -- interventions designed to influence individual decision-making and behavior
        • behavior change communication 1 -- strategic communication approach to influence individual and community behaviors
        • community conversations 4 -- structured dialogue approach for community engagement and behavior change
        • community theater 1 -- use of theatrical performances and storytelling to raise awareness and promote social change in communities
        • theatre of the oppressed 2 -- participatory theatre methodology for addressing social issues and power dynamics
        • participatory theatre 1 -- interactive drama approach used for community education and social change
        • forum theatre 1 -- interactive performance method to explore social issues and solutions
        • mass awareness programs 1 -- large-scale outreach activities to disseminate information and promote adoption
    • Multi-Stakeholder Engagement and Policy Dialogue -- Stakeholder engagement, policy dialogue, advocacy, and institutional coordination for agricultural development
      • Policy Dialogue and Advocacy -- Policy dialogue, advocacy, and evidence-based policy processes
        • policy dialogue 2 -- structured discussions among stakeholders to inform policy development and implementation
        • policy advocacy 2 -- strategic efforts to influence policy decisions using evidence
        • evidence-based policy 6 -- policy development informed by systematic research evidence
        • policy uptake 3 -- adoption and implementation of research findings in policy frameworks
        • science-policy interface 1 -- mechanisms connecting scientific research with policy development and implementation
        • policy coherence 8 -- alignment and coordination of policies across different levels and sectors of governance
        • policy coherence analysis 1 -- systematic assessment of alignment and consistency across multiple policies
        • policy alignment 2 -- coordination of policies and institutional frameworks for coherent implementation
        • policy integration 7 -- incorporating innovations into official government frameworks
        • policy assessment 4 -- evaluation of regulatory frameworks and their effectiveness
        • policy analysis 2 -- systematic evaluation of policy options, impacts, and implementation strategies
      • Networking and Collaboration -- Networking, collaboration, and partnership development
        • networking support 1 -- facilitated connections and information exchange between professionals
        • partnership assessment framework 1 -- systematic evaluation of breeding program capabilities and improvement needs
        • partnership health assessment 1 -- evaluation of collaboration effectiveness among institutional partners
        • multi-stakeholder approaches 1 -- collaborative methods involving diverse actors in problem-solving
        • business-to-business forum 2 -- platform for learning, networking, and joint problem-solving to catalyze business growth and competitiveness
        • business-to-business discussion tools 1 -- structured dialogue mechanisms to strengthen coordination and collaboration among value chain actors
        • private sector engagement 2 -- involving commercial entities in development initiatives
        • private sector investment 4 -- mobilization of commercial capital for development and sustainability outcomes
        • enabling environment 3 -- policy and regulatory conditions that support business development
        • localization 1 -- shifting leadership and decision-making to local actors in development interventions
    • Digital Literacy and Data Systems for Extension -- Digital literacy, data collection, and digital tools supporting extension and knowledge systems
      • Digital Literacy and Inclusion -- Digital literacy, inclusiveness, and access to digital tools
        • digital literacy 5 -- capacity to effectively use digital technologies for information and communication
        • digital inclusiveness 1 -- ensuring equitable access and participation in digital technologies and innovations
        • digital transformation 8 -- integration of digital technologies to reshape agricultural and food systems
        • digital agriculture 15 -- use of digital technologies to enhance agricultural productivity and sustainability
        • digital farming tools 3 -- technology platforms that support agricultural decision-making and farmer participation in sustainable practices
        • digital methods 1 -- computational approaches for analyzing online data and digital content
      • Data Collection and Management for Extension -- Digital data collection, management, and monitoring for extension programs
        • digital data collection 7 -- electronic systems for gathering and analyzing information
        • lean data collection 1 -- efficient data gathering focusing on essential information
        • digital tracking system 3 -- technology-based monitoring and data collection system for agricultural interventions
        • digital monitoring systems 2 -- electronic platforms for tracking and reporting agricultural activities and outcomes
        • digital monitoring platform 3 -- technology-based system for tracking and verification of activities
        • monitoring reporting verification 7 -- framework for tracking and validating environmental compliance
        • monitoring, reporting, and verification 3 -- systems for tracking and validating climate action progress
        • monitoring reporting and verification 1 -- systematic tracking and validation of environmental and agricultural outcomes
        • data digitization 2 -- process of converting analog information into digital formats for improved management
        • fair data principles 1 -- data management standards ensuring findable, accessible, interoperable, and reusable datasets
    • Miscellaneous Capacity and Knowledge Concepts -- Less frequent concepts related to capacity development, extension, and knowledge systems
      • Participatory and Community Learning Methods -- Specific participatory and community-based learning methods
        • farmer group model 1 -- organizational structure for collective farmer action and resource sharing
        • model farms 2 -- demonstration sites showcasing integrated agricultural technologies and practices
        • field excursion 2 -- educational approach using hands-on outdoor learning experiences
        • diagnostic bootcamp 2 -- interactive workshop format for identifying business constraints and solutions
        • community-based communication 1 -- information dissemination strategies that engage local communities and cultural practices
        • knowledge attitudes practices survey 1 -- assessment tool to evaluate understanding, perceptions, and behaviors
        • intra-household information sharing 1 -- flow of knowledge and data between members within farming households
        • wife-husband model 1 -- agricultural mechanization approach targeting gender-inclusive technology adoption
        • experimental gaming 1 -- use of games to study decision-making and behavior in controlled settings
        • product concept testing 1 -- evaluation of new product ideas with target users
        • video-based product concept testing 1 -- market research method using videos to test farmer preferences for hypothetical crop products
      • Institutional and Organizational Development -- Institutional development, coordination, and organizational capacity
        • agricultural research for development 1 -- research programs designed to generate agricultural innovations for development outcomes
        • shared services 2 -- centralized provision of common resources and capabilities across organizations
        • service delivery integration 1 -- coordination of multiple services to provide holistic support to farmers
        • standard operating procedures 1 -- documented processes that ensure consistent quality and compliance in service delivery
        • quality management systems 1 -- structured framework for ensuring consistent product quality and safety standards
        • quality assurance 2 -- systematic processes to ensure products or services meet specified standards
        • impact accelerator 1 -- coordinated system design to enhance adoption of agricultural innovations
        • savings and lending groups 1 -- community-based financial institutions that provide members with savings and credit services
        • community health worker model 1 -- healthcare delivery system using trained community members to provide basic health services
        • three-legged stool approach 1 -- innovative framework for improving meat safety in informal sectors
      • Scaling and Innovation Miscellaneous -- Additional scaling and innovation concepts
        • smart valleys approach 5 -- integrated water control system for inland valley rice production
        • climate-smart village approach 4 -- integrated community-level framework for implementing climate-smart agriculture
        • climate-smart villages 3 -- community-based research sites for testing and demonstrating climate adaptation technologies
        • agricultural commercialization clusters 3 -- geographic zones organized for coordinated agricultural development and market access
        • locally-led climate adaptation 8 -- community-driven adaptation strategies that integrate local knowledge with scientific data
        • locally led adaptation 4 -- community-driven climate adaptation strategies based on local knowledge and needs
        • locally led climate action 4 -- climate initiatives driven and controlled by local communities
        • sub-national implementation 2 -- execution of policies and programs at regional or local administrative levels
        • village-level governance 3 -- local institutional arrangements for decision-making and resource management
        • territorial mechanisms 3 -- local institutional arrangements that connect actors, infrastructure and information
        • impact pathway assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects through causal chains
        • impact measurement 1 -- systematic tracking and assessment of climate and environmental outcomes
  • Policy, Governance, and Institutional Systems -- Covers agricultural policy, governance frameworks, institutional coordination, and evidence-based policy processes
    • Agricultural Policy and Reform -- Policy analysis, coherence, subsidy reform, and agricultural policy advocacy
      • Core Policy Instruments -- Fundamental policy tools and frameworks
        • policy coherence 8 -- alignment and coordination of policies across different levels and sectors of governance
        • policy integration 7 -- incorporating innovations into official government frameworks
        • policy alignment 2 -- coordination of policies and institutional frameworks for coherent implementation
        • policy analysis 2 -- systematic evaluation of policy options, impacts, and implementation strategies
        • policy assessment 4 -- evaluation of regulatory frameworks and their effectiveness
        • fertilizer policy 2 -- government regulations and subsidies governing fertilizer availability, pricing, and use
        • climate policy integration 11 -- systematic inclusion of sector-specific solutions into national and international climate strategies
        • nationally determined contributions 20 -- country-specific climate action plans under the Paris Agreement
        • national adaptation plans 5 -- medium to long-term national planning processes for climate adaptation
        • social protection policy 1 -- government frameworks for providing assistance to vulnerable populations
        • migration policy 1 -- government strategies and frameworks for managing human mobility
      • Subsidy and Finance Reform -- Subsidy repurposing, agricultural support reform
        • fertilizer subsidy reform 1 -- policy changes to agricultural input support programs
        • subsidy repurposing 1 -- redirecting government subsidy spending toward more effective development investments
        • agricultural support repurposing 1 -- reforming agricultural policies and financial instruments for sustainable food system transformation
        • food subsidies 1 -- government support to reduce food costs for targeted populations
        • fisheries subsidies 1 -- government financial support to fishing industry operations
        • conditional subsidies 1 -- financial incentives tied to specific agricultural practices or outcomes
      • Policy Harmonization and Coordination -- Cross-sector and cross-border policy alignment
        • policy harmonization 1 -- aligning policies across jurisdictions for consistency
        • policy coherence analysis 1 -- systematic assessment of alignment and consistency across multiple policies
        • climate policy coordination 1 -- systematic coordination of climate action and policy implementation across government levels
        • agricultural distortions 1 -- policy-induced inefficiencies that affect agricultural productivity and resource allocation
      • Miscellaneous Agricultural Policy -- Other agricultural policy concepts
        • policy practice index 1 -- tool for tracking policy formulation and implementation effectiveness
        • digital marketing regulation 1 -- policies controlling online promotion of products to specific populations
        • refugee policy impact 2 -- political and social effects of policies governing refugee populations
    • Governance and Institutional Coordination -- Multi-stakeholder platforms, institutional coordination, polycentric and participatory governance
      • Multi-Stakeholder Platforms and Partnerships -- Platforms and partnerships for collaborative governance
        • multi-stakeholder platforms 33 -- collaborative spaces bringing together diverse actors for innovation and change
        • multistakeholder platforms 5 -- collaborative mechanisms bringing together diverse actors to address common challenges
        • multi-stakeholder engagement 9 -- collaborative processes involving diverse actors including farmers, government, researchers, and private sector
        • multi-stakeholder collaboration 5 -- coordinated engagement among diverse organizations and sectors toward common goals
        • multi-stakeholder partnership 4 -- collaborative arrangements involving diverse actors from different sectors
        • multistakeholder partnerships 2 -- collaborative arrangements involving diverse actors across agricultural value chains
        • multistakeholder networks 2 -- collaborative structures involving diverse actors to coordinate knowledge sharing and scaling
        • multi-stakeholder approaches 1 -- collaborative methods involving diverse actors in problem-solving
        • innovation platforms 5 -- multi-stakeholder forums for collaborative problem-solving and knowledge sharing
        • innovation networks 7 -- collaborative platforms connecting multiple actors to facilitate knowledge exchange and scaling
        • district working groups 2 -- collaborative governance structures for coordinated natural resource management
      • Institutional Coordination Mechanisms -- Coordination between institutions and organizations
        • institutional coordination 4 -- alignment and collaboration among organizations and agencies
        • inter-institutional coordination 3 -- collaborative arrangements between different organizations for common goals
        • multisectoral collaboration 3 -- coordination across different sectors and disciplines
        • collective action 2 -- coordinated community efforts to address shared challenges
        • enabling environment 3 -- policy and regulatory conditions that support business development
        • institutional learning 1 -- systematic knowledge acquisition and application within organizations
        • territorial mechanisms 3 -- local institutional arrangements that connect actors, infrastructure and information
        • territorial innovation networks 2 -- collaborative networks linking research, extension and farmers across geographic territories
      • Participatory and Polycentric Governance -- Participatory governance models and decentralized approaches
        • participatory governance 10 -- inclusive decision-making processes involving multiple stakeholders
        • polycentric governance 1 -- multi-level decision-making involving multiple centers of authority
        • community-based governance 2 -- local management systems where communities control and manage shared resources
        • village-level governance 3 -- local institutional arrangements for decision-making and resource management
        • community-led governance 1 -- local management systems where communities control decision-making processes
        • rangeland governance 2 -- institutional arrangements for managing communal grazing lands and resources
        • inclusive water governance 2 -- water management frameworks that ensure equitable participation and benefit-sharing
        • groundwater governance 2 -- institutional frameworks and practices for sustainable groundwater resource management
        • water governance 1 -- institutional frameworks and processes for managing water resources
        • global water governance 1 -- international frameworks and institutions for managing water resources across borders
        • climate governance 1 -- institutional frameworks and processes for climate change decision-making
        • decentralized service delivery 1 -- distribution of services through local providers rather than centralized institutions
        • sub-national implementation 2 -- execution of policies and programs at regional or local administrative levels
      • Stakeholder Engagement and Consultation -- Processes for engaging stakeholders in governance
        • stakeholder engagement 16 -- systematic involvement of relevant parties in decision-making processes
        • stakeholder consultation 4 -- structured engagement with relevant parties to gather input and build consensus
        • stakeholder dialogue 3 -- structured multi-party discussions to address complex resource management challenges
        • stakeholder mapping 1 -- systematic identification and categorization of relevant actors and their relationships
        • civil society engagement 2 -- involvement of non-governmental organizations and community groups in policy and development processes
        • community engagement 2 -- participatory processes involving local stakeholders in development initiatives
        • partnership assessment framework 1 -- systematic evaluation of breeding program capabilities and improvement needs
        • partnership health assessment 1 -- evaluation of collaboration effectiveness among institutional partners
      • Conflict-Sensitive Governance -- Governance in fragile and conflict-affected settings
        • conflict-sensitive programming 6 -- development approach that considers potential conflict risks and promotes peace-building
        • fragile and conflict-affected settings 6 -- contexts characterized by violence, weak institutions and humanitarian crises
        • fragile and conflict-affected systems 2 -- food systems operating in contexts of institutional fragility and conflict
        • humanitarian-development-peace nexus 4 -- integrated approach linking humanitarian aid, development programming, and peacebuilding
        • humanitarian-development nexus 1 -- integration of scientific research into humanitarian efforts for sustainable solutions
        • environmental peacebuilding 2 -- use of environmental cooperation to promote peace and social cohesion in post-conflict areas
        • conflict sensitivity 5 -- considering peace and conflict dynamics in development interventions
        • hdp nexus 1 -- integrated approach linking humanitarian, development, and peace interventions
    • Regulatory Frameworks and Standards -- Biosafety regulation, phytosanitary regulation, seed certification, and quality standards
      • Seed and Variety Regulation -- Regulatory frameworks for seeds and variety registration
        • variety registration 52 -- official approval of new varieties for commercial release
        • seed certification 4 -- formal quality assurance system for verifying seed quality and genetic purity
        • seed certification regulations 1 -- legal frameworks ensuring seed quality and standards
        • variety release procedures 3 -- formal processes for approving and distributing new crop varieties
        • variety licensing 4 -- commercialization strategy where public research institutions license improved varieties to private sector
        • varietal registration 1 -- official process to approve and license new crop varieties for commercial use
        • organic certification 4 -- formal verification process ensuring agricultural products meet organic production standards
        • quality declared seed 1 -- seed certification system ensuring genetic purity and quality standards
      • Phytosanitary and Biosafety Regulation -- Plant health and biosafety regulatory frameworks
        • phytosanitary regulation 1 -- policies and standards for preventing plant disease spread through seed systems
        • phytosanitary measures 2 -- regulations and practices to prevent spread of plant pests and diseases
        • phytosanitary testing 1 -- laboratory procedures to detect plant pathogens and ensure plant health
        • biosafety protocols 2 -- standardized procedures to prevent biological contamination and exposure
        • biosafety regulatory compliance 1 -- adherence to safety protocols and regulations for genetically modified organisms
        • regulatory oversight 1 -- systematic monitoring and enforcement of standards and regulations
        • post-entry quarantine 1 -- controlled isolation and testing of introduced plant material to prevent pest and disease spread
      • Quality and Food Safety Standards -- Standards for food safety and quality assurance
        • food safety 6 -- assurance that food will not cause harm when prepared or consumed
        • food safety management 2 -- systematic approach to ensuring safe food production and handling
        • food safety monitoring 2 -- systematic surveillance of contaminants and hazards in food systems
        • food safety training 1 -- education programs to improve food handling and safety practices
        • quality assurance 2 -- systematic processes to ensure products or services meet specified standards
        • quality control 2 -- systematic processes to ensure product standards
        • quality management systems 1 -- structured framework for ensuring consistent product quality and safety standards
        • good agricultural practices 9 -- science-backed farming techniques including timely planting, optimal fertilizer rates, and improved varieties
        • traceability 2 -- ability to track products through supply chain stages
        • traceability systems 1 -- systems for tracking products through supply chains
        • iso/iec 17025 1 -- international standard for testing and calibration laboratory competence
        • standard operating procedures 1 -- documented processes that ensure consistent quality and compliance in service delivery
      • Antimicrobial Resistance Governance -- Regulatory and governance frameworks for antimicrobial resistance
        • antimicrobial resistance 5 -- ability of microorganisms to survive exposure to antimicrobial drugs
        • antimicrobial resistance surveillance 11 -- systematic monitoring of antimicrobial resistance patterns in pathogens to inform public health responses
        • antimicrobial stewardship 6 -- coordinated interventions to optimize antimicrobial use and minimize resistance development
        • antibiotic resistance monitoring 3 -- surveillance and measurement of antimicrobial resistance in bacterial populations
      • Miscellaneous Regulatory Concepts -- Other regulatory and standards concepts
        • geographical indications 1 -- certification system linking product quality and characteristics to specific geographic origins
        • digital sequence information 3 -- genomic data used for genetic resource characterization and analysis
        • multilateral system 1 -- international framework for sharing plant genetic resources
        • stewardship guidelines 1 -- management protocols to ensure sustainable use of agricultural technologies
        • participatory guarantee systems 1 -- community-based certification mechanisms for organic and agroecological production
    • Evidence Generation and Policy Uptake -- Evidence-based policy, impact evaluation, policy dialogue, science-policy interface, and policy advocacy
      • Evidence-Based Policy Processes -- Generating and using evidence for policy decisions
        • evidence-based policy 6 -- policy development informed by systematic research evidence
        • policy uptake 3 -- adoption and implementation of research findings in policy frameworks
        • policy dialogue 2 -- structured discussions among stakeholders to inform policy development and implementation
        • policy advocacy 2 -- strategic efforts to influence policy decisions using evidence
        • science-policy interface 1 -- mechanisms connecting scientific research with policy development and implementation
        • evidence gap mapping 4 -- systematic methodology to identify and visualize gaps in research evidence
        • evidence-based decision support 3 -- agricultural advisory systems using scientific data to guide farmer decisions
      • Impact Evaluation and Assessment -- Methods and frameworks for evaluating policy and program impacts
        • impact evaluation 4 -- systematic assessment of changes caused by development interventions
        • impact assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects on outcomes
        • cost-benefit analysis 6 -- economic evaluation method using financial indicators like NPV and IRR
        • cost-effectiveness analysis 2 -- economic evaluation comparing costs and outcomes of different interventions
        • economic impact assessment 2 -- quantitative evaluation of economic benefits and costs of interventions
        • ex ante economic analysis 2 -- forward-looking assessment of investment returns before implementation
        • theory of change 4 -- comprehensive description of how and why desired change is expected to happen
        • monitoring and evaluation 8 -- systematic assessment of intervention implementation and outcomes
        • monitoring and evaluation frameworks 3 -- structured approaches to measure and assess intervention outcomes
        • participatory monitoring and evaluation 3 -- community-led approach to tracking progress and assessing outcomes using locally relevant indicators
        • systematic review 7 -- comprehensive review methodology using systematic search and analysis protocols
        • meta-analysis 3 -- statistical method for combining results from multiple studies to assess overall effects
        • computable general equilibrium modeling 5 -- economic modeling approach for policy impact analysis
        • social accounting matrix 2 -- comprehensive economic accounting framework linking production, income and expenditure flows
        • randomized controlled trial 12 -- experimental design with random assignment to treatment and control groups
        • longitudinal impact assessment 1 -- long-term tracking of intervention effects over multiple time periods
        • impact pathway assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects through causal chains
        • impact measurement 1 -- systematic tracking and assessment of climate and environmental outcomes
      • Monitoring, Reporting and Verification -- Systems for tracking and verifying policy outcomes
        • monitoring reporting verification 7 -- framework for tracking and validating environmental compliance
        • monitoring, reporting, and verification 3 -- systems for tracking and validating climate action progress
        • monitoring reporting and verification 1 -- systematic tracking and validation of environmental and agricultural outcomes
        • adaptation tracking 1 -- systematic monitoring and evaluation of climate adaptation interventions and outcomes
        • climate finance tracking 6 -- systems for monitoring flow and use of climate-related funding
        • indicator framework monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking of multiple metrics to assess food system performance
      • Knowledge Exchange and Policy Learning -- Platforms and processes for knowledge sharing in policy contexts
        • community of practice 24 -- collaborative network for sharing knowledge and best practices among practitioners
