        • knowledge exchange 4 -- systematic sharing and transfer of information and expertise between stakeholders
        • knowledge platform 2 -- digital system for organizing, sharing and accessing information resources
        • south-south collaboration 2 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries
        • south-south cooperation 1 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries for mutual development
        • peer learning networks 2 -- farmer-to-farmer knowledge sharing platforms for scaling innovations
        • advocacy training 4 -- educational programs to develop skills for promoting causes and influencing policy
        • food systems leadership 2 -- leadership development and behaviors within agricultural and food system contexts
      • Foresight and Strategic Planning -- Forward-looking analysis for policy planning
        • strategic foresight 2 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios to inform current decisions
        • foresight analysis 1 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios for strategic planning
        • food systems foresight 1 -- strategic planning methodology for anticipating future food system changes
        • participatory foresight 1 -- collaborative approach to exploring and planning for future scenarios
        • participatory scenario development 1 -- collaborative process for creating future scenarios with stakeholder input
        • systems thinking 2 -- holistic approach to understanding complex problems by examining interconnections and leverage points
        • adaptive management 4 -- iterative management approach that adjusts based on learning and feedback
    • Public-Private Partnerships and Investment -- Public-private partnerships, investment planning, blended finance, and private sector engagement
      • Partnership Models -- Frameworks for public-private collaboration
        • public-private partnerships 20 -- collaborative arrangements between government and private sector entities
        • private sector engagement 2 -- involving commercial entities in development initiatives
        • private sector investment 4 -- mobilization of commercial capital for development and sustainability outcomes
        • contract farming 2 -- agricultural production under forward contracts between farmers and buyers
        • inclusive business models 3 -- commercial strategies ensuring access to services for smallholder farmers and marginalized groups
        • business model development 8 -- creation of sustainable commercial frameworks for technology adoption
        • sustainable business model 1 -- commercial framework balancing economic viability with environmental and social benefits
      • Investment and Finance Mechanisms -- Financing instruments and investment planning for agriculture
        • blended finance 8 -- combination of public and private funding to reduce investment risks
        • blended financing 1 -- financial strategy combining public and private funding sources to mobilize resources for development
        • climate finance 11 -- financial mechanisms including carbon credits and international funds to support climate solutions
        • climate finance mechanisms 4 -- financial instruments and structures designed to fund climate mitigation and adaptation projects
        • climate finance mobilization 1 -- strategies to attract and deploy financial resources for climate adaptation and mitigation
        • climate finance taxonomy 1 -- classification framework for directing climate investments toward specific sectors and activities
        • adaptation finance 3 -- financial resources dedicated to climate change adaptation activities
        • investment planning 3 -- systematic process for identifying and prioritizing climate-resilient investments
        • investment action plan 2 -- strategic framework outlining funding requirements and implementation pathways
        • investment readiness 2 -- preparation of enterprises for attracting investment funding
        • bankable investment projects 1 -- development projects structured to meet financial institution lending criteria
        • bankable project development 1 -- preparation of investment-ready proposals that meet funding institution requirements
        • financial innovation 1 -- development of new financial products and services for agricultural value chains
        • biodiversity-positive financing 1 -- investment mechanisms that channel finance toward biodiversity conservation and sustainable livelihoods
        • carbon market readiness 1 -- capacity building to enable participation in carbon trading mechanisms
        • payment for ecosystem services 2 -- economic mechanism compensating land managers for environmental benefits
        • payments for ecosystem services 1 -- economic incentives for conservation and environmental stewardship
        • payment for environmental services 2 -- economic mechanism that compensates land users for providing ecosystem services
        • payments for environmental services 1 -- economic incentive schemes that reward farmers for environmental stewardship
        • eco-compensation 2 -- payment mechanism to compensate for environmental services and conservation efforts
        • carbon trading 3 -- market-based mechanism for trading carbon credits to offset greenhouse gas emissions
        • carbon credit certification 2 -- formal verification process that enables farmers to monetize emission reductions through carbon markets
      • Business Development and Incubation -- Support for agricultural enterprises and entrepreneurs
        • business incubation 4 -- support system for developing and accelerating new enterprises
        • business development services 2 -- support services to strengthen enterprise capacity and growth
        • agribusiness acceleration 3 -- structured support to help agricultural enterprises scale and access markets
        • accelerator programs 1 -- structured support programs for scaling agricultural innovations and businesses
        • youth entrepreneurship 2 -- support for business development and job creation among young people
        • micro small medium enterprises 4 -- small-scale business entities that form the backbone of many developing economies
        • cooperative development 3 -- building organizational capacity and governance structures for farmer collective action
    • Scaling and Innovation Systems -- Frameworks and approaches for scaling agricultural innovations
      • Scaling Frameworks and Approaches -- Methodologies for scaling agricultural innovations
        • scaling for impact 18 -- systematic approach to expanding successful innovations to achieve broader development outcomes
        • scaling pathways 12 -- systematic approaches to expand adoption of innovations
        • scaling framework 7 -- systematic approach for expanding successful interventions to broader contexts
        • scaling strategies 5 -- systematic methods for expanding successful interventions to broader populations
        • scaling readiness 5 -- systematic preparation of innovations for widespread adoption and implementation
        • innovation scaling 6 -- process of expanding successful agricultural innovations to broader adoption
        • inclusive scaling 4 -- strategy for expanding improved varieties that ensures broad access across different farm types and socioeconomic levels
        • responsible scaling 2 -- expansion of innovations while anticipating and mitigating social and environmental risks
        • adaptive scaling 2 -- approach to scaling innovations that adapts to local contexts and market conditions
        • producer-led scaling 4 -- farmer-driven expansion of successful practices through peer-to-peer learning
        • gender-responsive scaling 1 -- scaling strategies that integrate gender considerations and address gendered barriers
        • participatory scaling 1 -- collaborative approach to expanding successful interventions through stakeholder engagement
        • selective scaling 1 -- targeted expansion strategy focusing on specific contexts or beneficiary groups for improved varieties
        • scaling assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting innovation adoption and diffusion
        • scaling readiness assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting the scaling of innovations
        • science of scaling 1 -- evidence-based understanding of how innovations achieve widespread adoption and impact
        • scaling scan tool 1 -- assessment framework to evaluate innovation scalability potential
        • scaling hubs 1 -- regional platforms that coordinate partnerships and knowledge sharing for agricultural innovation adoption
        • scaling champions 2 -- trusted individuals who coordinate actors and support innovation adoption
        • scaling fund 1 -- financial mechanism supporting innovation expansion and market penetration
        • scaling 4 -- process of expanding successful innovations or interventions to reach broader populations or geographic areas
      • Agricultural Innovation Systems -- Systems and networks for agricultural innovation
        • agricultural innovation systems 2 -- networks of organizations, policies, and processes that generate, adapt, and diffuse agricultural technologies
        • innovation hubs 2 -- territorial platforms that connect actors, capacities, and knowledge for technology validation and scaling
        • living lab 6 -- collaborative innovation platform where stakeholders co-create and test solutions in real-world settings
        • agroecosystem living labs 2 -- collaborative research approach engaging farmers and communities to test climate-smart practices in real farming systems
        • innovation bundling 5 -- integrating technical, digital and institutional solutions to address interconnected challenges
        • responsible innovation 2 -- innovation processes that consider ethical, social, and environmental implications
        • innovation validation 1 -- systematic testing of prototypes and assumptions with real users before full implementation
        • agricultural research for development 1 -- research programs designed to generate agricultural innovations for development outcomes
    • Capacity Development and Institutional Learning -- Building institutional and human capacity for policy and governance
      • Capacity Building Programs -- Programs and approaches for building capacity
        • capacity building 262 -- systematic development of skills and knowledge among target beneficiaries
        • capacity development 26 -- building skills and knowledge of individuals and organizations
        • capacity strengthening 8 -- systematic development of technical and organizational abilities to implement and scale innovations
        • capacity sharing 3 -- collaborative exchange of skills, knowledge, and resources between institutions
        • training of trainers 18 -- capacity building approach that prepares participants to train others
        • technical assistance 7 -- expert support to strengthen implementation capacity
        • curriculum development 3 -- systematic design and creation of educational programs and materials
        • curriculum integration 6 -- incorporation of new knowledge and practices into educational programs
        • curriculum institutionalization 1 -- formal integration of interdisciplinary courses into university academic programs
        • capacity building training 4 -- structured educational intervention to develop skills and knowledge among target participants
        • capacity development training 2 -- structured learning interventions to enhance skills and knowledge of individuals or organizations
      • Knowledge Management and Dissemination -- Systems for managing and sharing institutional knowledge
        • knowledge management system 1 -- platform for organizing and sharing information and experiences
        • knowledge dissemination 3 -- systematic sharing of research findings and expertise across communities
        • knowledge sharing 1 -- exchange of information and expertise among stakeholders
        • knowledge diffusion 1 -- spread of agricultural information and practices through farmer networks
        • technology transfer 6 -- process of moving innovations from research to practical application
        • technology dissemination 2 -- process of spreading improved agricultural technologies to farmers
        • technology diffusion 3 -- spread and adoption of new technologies across markets and users
    • Gender, Social Inclusion, and Equity in Governance -- Gender-responsive and socially inclusive governance frameworks
      • Gender-Responsive Policy and Governance -- Integrating gender into policy and governance processes
        • gender-responsive policy 2 -- policy framework that integrates gender equality considerations into planning and implementation
        • gender-responsive budgeting 2 -- budget analysis and allocation considering differential gender impacts
        • gender mainstreaming 8 -- systematic integration of gender perspectives into policies and programs
        • gender transformative approaches 29 -- interventions that address root causes of gender inequality and transform power relations
        • gender and social inclusion 7 -- ensuring equitable participation and benefits across social groups
        • gender equality social inclusion 3 -- ensuring equitable participation and benefits for all groups
        • gender equality and social inclusion 2 -- strategy to ensure equitable participation of marginalized groups
        • social equity integration 3 -- ensuring marginalized groups have equal access to resources and decision-making in development programs
        • social inclusion 2 -- ensuring marginalized groups have access to opportunities and services
        • inclusive climate planning 1 -- participatory planning processes that ensure diverse stakeholder representation in climate initiatives
        • women's political participation 4 -- involvement of women in political processes and decision-making
        • women's land ownership 1 -- legal and social recognition of women's rights to own and control land resources
        • gender-inclusive planning 1 -- incorporating gender equality and social inclusion considerations into development planning
      • Social Protection and Safety Nets -- Social protection policies and programs
        • social protection 12 -- policies and programs designed to reduce poverty and vulnerability
        • shock-responsive social protection 1 -- social safety net programs that can rapidly scale up during emergencies
        • adaptive social protection 1 -- social safety nets that adjust to climate and economic shocks
        • social protection systems 1 -- government programs providing support to vulnerable populations during crises
        • cash transfers 2 -- direct monetary payments to individuals or households as social assistance
        • cash transfer programs 2 -- direct monetary assistance provided to households to improve welfare outcomes
        • tapered cash transfers 1 -- gradually diminishing cash payments designed to support transition to self-reliance
        • digital cash transfers 1 -- electronic delivery of monetary assistance to beneficiaries
        • social transfer programs 1 -- government programs providing financial or in-kind support to households
        • ultra-poor graduation model 3 -- integrated intervention combining cash transfers, assets, training, and coaching for extreme poverty
        • school feeding programs 6 -- institutional programs providing nutritious meals to school children
        • home-grown school feeding 4 -- programs linking local food production with school nutrition
        • institutional procurement 2 -- structured purchasing by organizations like schools or governments
        • lean season assistance 1 -- humanitarian support during periods when food stocks are depleted and prices peak
      • Justice and Equity Frameworks -- Frameworks for environmental and social justice
        • environmental justice 2 -- equitable distribution of environmental benefits and burdens across social groups
        • climate justice 2 -- fair treatment of all people regarding climate change impacts and solutions
        • water justice 1 -- equitable access to water resources and inclusive decision-making in water management
        • distributive justice 1 -- fair allocation of resources ensuring equitable access to quantity, quality, and affordability
        • procedural justice 1 -- inclusive and participatory decision-making processes involving affected stakeholders
        • just transition 3 -- equitable shift to sustainable economy that leaves no one behind and creates decent work opportunities
        • land tenure security 1 -- legal and institutional frameworks that provide secure rights to land ownership or use
        • human security 3 -- protection of individuals from threats to their safety and wellbeing
    • Climate Policy and Finance Governance -- Governance frameworks for climate action, finance, and international commitments
      • Climate Action Governance -- Governance of climate action and adaptation planning
        • climate action 18 -- coordinated efforts to address climate change through mitigation and adaptation strategies
        • locally-led climate adaptation 8 -- community-driven adaptation strategies that integrate local knowledge with scientific data
        • locally led adaptation 4 -- community-driven climate adaptation strategies based on local knowledge and needs
        • locally led climate action 4 -- climate initiatives driven and controlled by local communities
        • climate adaptation planning 10 -- systematic planning to reduce climate vulnerability
        • transformational adaptation 4 -- fundamental changes in agricultural systems to address climate change impacts
        • transformative adaptation 3 -- fundamental changes in systems to address climate impacts
        • global goal on adaptation 1 -- international climate policy framework for adaptation planning and implementation
        • climate negotiations 1 -- international diplomatic processes to address climate change
        • climate loss and damage 1 -- economic and non-economic losses from climate change impacts that cannot be avoided through adaptation
        • loss and damage assessment 1 -- quantification of climate-related losses that cannot be avoided through adaptation
      • Disaster Risk and Humanitarian Governance -- Governance frameworks for disaster risk and humanitarian response
        • disaster risk management 2 -- systematic approach to identifying, assessing, and reducing risks from natural hazards
        • anticipatory action 9 -- proactive interventions based on early warning signals to prevent crises
        • humanitarian response 2 -- coordinated assistance to populations affected by crises and disasters
        • conflict-affected settings 2 -- regions experiencing or recovering from armed conflict or civil unrest
        • forced displacement 4 -- involuntary movement of people due to conflict, persecution, or environmental factors
        • climate-induced displacement 4 -- forced migration resulting from climate change impacts and extreme weather events
        • climate-displacement nexus 4 -- relationship between climate change impacts and human displacement
        • climate-peace-security nexus 5 -- integrated framework addressing interconnected climate, peace and security challenges
        • climate-conflict nexus 12 -- the interconnected relationship between climate change impacts and violent conflict emergence
        • climate security 16 -- framework addressing security risks arising from climate change impacts
        • climate fragility 2 -- vulnerability of systems to climate-related stresses and shocks
        • managed resettlement 1 -- planned relocation of communities away from climate hazards
  • Research Methods and Impact Assessment -- Covers research design, analytical methods, monitoring and evaluation, and impact assessment approaches used in agricultural research
    • Experimental and Quasi-Experimental Methods -- Controlled trials, experimental designs, and quasi-experimental approaches used in agricultural research
      • Randomized and Controlled Trials -- Randomized controlled trials and related experimental designs
        • randomized controlled trial 12 -- experimental design with random assignment to treatment and control groups
        • randomized control trial 1 -- experimental design randomly assigning subjects to treatment and control groups
        • randomized evaluation 1 -- experimental research design using random assignment to measure intervention impacts
        • cluster randomized control trial 1 -- experimental design where groups rather than individuals are randomly assigned to treatments
        • cluster randomized controlled trial 1 -- experimental design where groups rather than individuals are randomly assigned to treatments
        • clustered randomized control trial 1 -- experimental design using randomized groups of clusters to test interventions
        • difference-in-differences analysis 1 -- statistical method comparing treatment and control groups over time
      • Field and On-Farm Trials -- Experimental methods conducted in field and farm settings
        • on-farm testing 16 -- evaluating varieties under actual farmer field conditions
        • on-farm trials 1 -- field research conducted on farmers' own land to test innovations under real conditions
        • on-farm verification 1 -- testing crop varieties under actual farmer conditions to validate performance
        • long-term experiments 1 -- extended research studies conducted over multiple years to assess agricultural and environmental outcomes
        • multi-environment testing 4 -- evaluating varieties across multiple locations and conditions
        • multi-environment trials 4 -- testing genotypes across multiple locations and conditions
        • multi-location testing 2 -- evaluation of crop varieties across multiple environments to assess performance and adaptation
        • multi-location trials 1 -- testing of crop varieties across multiple geographic locations for validation
        • multi-site validation 1 -- testing technologies across multiple locations to assess performance and adaptability
        • multilocation trials 1 -- testing varieties across multiple sites to assess performance and adaptation
        • variety trial 1 -- systematic evaluation of crop or forage varieties across different environments
        • regional variety trials 1 -- multi-location testing of varieties across geographic regions
        • variety adaptation trials 2 -- field testing to evaluate crop performance under local conditions
        • multi-environment trial evaluation 3 -- testing of varieties across multiple locations and seasons
      • Experimental Preference and Valuation Methods -- Methods for eliciting preferences and valuations in experimental settings
        • experimental auctions 1 -- controlled market experiments to determine economic preferences
        • discrete choice experiments 3 -- statistical method to elicit preferences by presenting respondents with choice scenarios
        • willingness to pay 3 -- economic measure of maximum amount consumers will pay for a good or service
        • willingness to pay assessment 1 -- economic evaluation of farmer demand for agricultural technologies
        • contingent valuation 2 -- survey-based method to estimate economic value of non-market goods
        • choice experiment 1 -- research method using hypothetical scenarios to elicit preferences
        • best-worst scaling 1 -- survey method for assessing preferences by comparing best and worst options
        • vickrey auction 1 -- sealed-bid auction mechanism for economic valuation where highest bidder pays second-highest price
        • triadic comparisons of technology options 15 -- research approach to decentralize technology evaluation using large numbers of participants for higher external validity
        • triadic comparison of technologies 2 -- participatory evaluation method where farmers compare three technologies simultaneously
    • Qualitative and Mixed Methods -- Participatory, qualitative, and mixed-methods approaches used in agricultural research
      • Participatory Research Methods -- Methods involving active participation of stakeholders and communities
        • participatory research 32 -- research approach involving stakeholders as active participants in knowledge generation
        • participatory approach 13 -- research and development methods involving stakeholder participation
        • participatory methods 5 -- research approaches involving active participation of study subjects
        • participatory rural appraisal 1 -- community-based research method using local knowledge and participation
        • participatory evaluation 5 -- research approach involving farmers and stakeholders in assessment of technologies
        • participatory monitoring and evaluation 3 -- community-led approach to tracking progress and assessing outcomes using locally relevant indicators
        • participatory mapping 7 -- collaborative approach involving farmers in adaptation planning and field-level solutions
        • participatory diagnosis 5 -- collaborative assessment of needs and priorities involving stakeholders
        • participatory co-design 3 -- collaborative approach involving stakeholders in designing research and interventions
        • participatory design 2 -- collaborative approach involving end-users in the design and development process
        • participatory learning 8 -- educational methodology where stakeholders actively engage in knowledge creation and sharing through collaborative activities
        • participatory learning methodology 2 -- educational approach that engages participants in dialogue and reflection to foster learning and behavior change
        • participatory methodology 2 -- research approach that actively involves community members in the design and implementation process
        • participatory assessment 1 -- evaluation approach involving stakeholder participation in research and development
        • participatory validation 1 -- research approach involving stakeholders in confirming and refining findings
        • participatory action research 1 -- collaborative research approach involving stakeholders in problem-solving
        • participatory action learning 1 -- collaborative approach integrating local knowledge with scientific methods
        • participatory scenario development 1 -- collaborative process for creating future scenarios with stakeholder input
        • participatory foresight 1 -- collaborative approach to exploring and planning for future scenarios
        • participatory indicator selection 1 -- collaborative process for developing context-specific performance measures
        • participatory risk mapping 1 -- collaborative approach involving experts to identify climate-related risks and develop adaptation plans
        • participatory geographic information systems 1 -- community-based mapping approach integrating local knowledge with GIS technology
        • participatory framework 1 -- structured approach involving multiple stakeholders in decision-making processes
        • participatory technology development 1 -- collaborative approach involving stakeholders in designing and developing technologies
        • action research 1 -- research approach combining investigation with direct action for social change
        • village-led action research 1 -- community-driven research approach where locals identify and address challenges
      • Co-Design and Co-Creation Methods -- Collaborative design and knowledge co-production approaches
        • co-design 17 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders in innovation creation
        • co-creation 4 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders
        • co-production 2 -- collaborative development process involving multiple stakeholders
        • co-production of knowledge 1 -- collaborative research approach involving communities in knowledge generation
        • human-centered design 19 -- participatory design approach that prioritizes user needs and experiences in technology development
        • user-centered design 3 -- design approach that prioritizes end-user needs and experiences throughout development
        • stakeholder co-design 2 -- collaborative design process involving all relevant parties in solution development
        • living lab 6 -- collaborative innovation platform where stakeholders co-create and test solutions in real-world settings
        • agroecosystem living labs 2 -- collaborative research approach engaging farmers and communities to test climate-smart practices in real farming systems
      • Mixed Methods and Interdisciplinary Approaches -- Research designs combining multiple methodological traditions
        • mixed-methods approach 4 -- research design combining quantitative and qualitative data collection techniques
        • interdisciplinary research 3 -- research approach combining multiple scientific disciplines to address complex problems
        • transdisciplinary research 1 -- problem-focused research approach that integrates knowledge from multiple disciplines and stakeholders
        • transdisciplinary approaches 1 -- research and intervention methods that integrate multiple disciplines and stakeholder perspectives
        • systems approach 3 -- holistic methodology analyzing interconnected components and feedback loops
        • systems thinking 2 -- holistic approach to understanding complex problems by examining interconnections and leverage points
        • systems science 1 -- interdisciplinary study of complex systems and their emergent properties
        • nexus approach 3 -- integrated analysis of water-energy-food-environment interactions and trade-offs
      • Qualitative and Social Research Techniques -- Qualitative data collection and social research methods
        • citizen science 12 -- scientific research conducted by members of the general public in collaboration with professional scientists
        • social network analysis 1 -- analytical method to study information flow and relationships within social networks
        • knowledge attitudes practices survey 1 -- assessment tool to evaluate understanding, perceptions, and behaviors
        • stakeholder consultation 4 -- structured engagement with relevant parties to gather input and build consensus
        • stakeholder dialogue 3 -- structured multi-party discussions to address complex resource management challenges
        • stakeholder mapping 1 -- systematic identification and categorization of relevant actors and their relationships
        • validation workshops 3 -- participatory sessions to verify and confirm research findings
        • community conversations 4 -- structured dialogue approach for community engagement and behavior change
        • focus group
        • shop-along methodology 1 -- observational research method following people during food shopping experiences
        • positive deviance approach 3 -- identifying and learning from individuals or groups with better outcomes despite similar constraints
        • pioneer positive deviance 8 -- approach that identifies and supports farmers already developing innovative local solutions
        • positive deviance 1 -- approach identifying successful practices among those facing similar challenges
        • tricot approach 3 -- triadic comparison method for on-farm testing where farmers rank three technologies
        • fuzzy cognitive mapping 1 -- participatory method to model stakeholder perceptions of system relationships
        • causal loop diagrams 1 -- systems thinking tool to map interconnected causes and effects
        • causal chain analysis 1 -- approach linking climate shocks, adaptive actions, and outcomes through explicit causal pathways
        • vision-to-action process 2 -- structured community planning approach to translate environmental goals into actionable farming plans
        • vision-to-action approach 2 -- participatory process to translate shared community visions into concrete, measurable actions
        • vision-to-action mapping 2 -- structured process for translating strategic visions into concrete action plans
        • diagnostic bootcamp 2 -- interactive workshop format for identifying business constraints and solutions
    • Economic and Systems Modeling -- Quantitative modeling, economic analysis, and systems simulation approaches
      • Economic Modeling and Analysis -- Macroeconomic and microeconomic modeling approaches
        • computable general equilibrium modeling 5 -- economic modeling approach for policy impact analysis
        • cost-benefit analysis 6 -- economic evaluation method using financial indicators like NPV and IRR
        • cost-effectiveness analysis 2 -- economic evaluation comparing costs and outcomes of different interventions
        • economic impact assessment 2 -- quantitative evaluation of economic benefits and costs of interventions
        • ex ante economic analysis 2 -- forward-looking assessment of investment returns before implementation
        • economic surplus modeling 1 -- analytical approach to quantify economic welfare impacts and benefits of interventions
        • equilibrium displacement modeling 1 -- economic analysis method examining market interactions and price effects
        • social accounting matrix 2 -- comprehensive economic accounting framework linking production, income and expenditure flows
        • economywide modeling 1 -- comprehensive economic analysis across all sectors of an economy
        • bio-economic modeling 1 -- analytical framework integrating biological and economic factors
        • technical efficiency analysis 2 -- measurement of how well inputs are converted to outputs relative to best practice
        • stochastic frontier analysis 1 -- econometric method to estimate production efficiency and separate inefficiency from random variation
        • true cost accounting 1 -- comprehensive assessment including environmental and social costs of food production
        • ecosystem services valuation 2 -- quantification and monetization of environmental benefits
        • ecosystem service valuation 1 -- economic quantification of benefits provided by natural systems
        • payment for ecosystem services 2 -- economic mechanism compensating land managers for environmental benefits
        • payments for ecosystem services 1 -- economic incentives for conservation and environmental stewardship
        • payment for environmental services 2 -- economic mechanism that compensates land users for providing ecosystem services
        • payments for environmental services 1 -- economic incentive schemes that reward farmers for environmental stewardship
        • economic return analysis 1 -- calculation of financial benefits and costs of agricultural interventions or investments
        • breeding program costing 6 -- systematic analysis of resource allocation and costs in breeding operations
        • breeding cost analysis 1 -- systematic assessment of operational costs in breeding programs for improved resource allocation
      • Systems and Simulation Modeling -- Simulation, dynamic, and process-based modeling approaches
        • crop modeling 7 -- mathematical simulation of crop growth and yield under different environmental and management conditions
        • crop simulation modeling 3 -- computational tools for predicting crop growth, yield, and environmental impacts under different scenarios
        • crop growth modeling 3 -- computational simulation of plant development and yield prediction
        • hydrological modeling 3 -- mathematical simulation of water cycle processes for water resource planning and management
        • hydrological modelling 1 -- mathematical simulation of water cycle processes for water resource management
        • system dynamics modeling 1 -- computational approach to understand complex systems through feedback loops, delays, and trade-offs
        • process-based modeling 1 -- simulation approach using mechanistic understanding of system processes
        • process-based simulation 1 -- modeling approach using mechanistic understanding of biological and physical processes
        • biophysical simulation modeling 1 -- computational approach to model water and nutrient flows in agricultural systems
        • stochastic dynamic population modeling 1 -- probabilistic modeling approach for livestock population health and economics
        • rapid response modeling 1 -- streamlined analytical approach to quickly assess impacts of global crises
        • global agricultural modeling 1 -- mathematical simulation of agricultural systems at global scale to analyze market and production dynamics
        • agricultural integrated assessment models 1 -- quantitative models combining economic, crop growth, and hydrology components for food security analysis
        • spatial production allocation modeling 1 -- geographic modeling of crop distribution and productivity patterns
        • hydro-economic modeling 1 -- integrated analysis combining hydrological and economic data for water resource management
        • water balance model 2 -- computational framework quantifying water inputs, outputs, and storage changes in agricultural systems
        • flood modeling 1 -- computational simulation of water flow patterns and flood behavior
        • watershed modeling 1 -- simulation of water flow and management at landscape scale
        • atmospheric dispersion modeling 1 -- mathematical simulation of how gases spread through the atmosphere
        • crop suitability modeling 1 -- analytical framework to assess geographic areas' suitability for growing different crops based on environmental conditions
        • micronutrient contribution modeling 1 -- analytical approach to calculate and visualize nutrient composition of food sources
      • Life Cycle and Environmental Assessment -- Methods for assessing environmental impacts and sustainability
        • life cycle assessment 1 -- evaluation of environmental impacts throughout a product's entire life cycle
        • carbon footprint assessment 3 -- quantification of greenhouse gas emissions from agricultural production systems
        • water footprint assessment 1 -- evaluation of green and blue water consumption patterns in agricultural systems
        • environmental impact assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of environmental effects of agricultural practices
        • sustainability assessment 1 -- evaluation framework measuring environmental, social and economic impacts
        • agroecological assessment 2 -- evaluation of agricultural systems using agroecological principles
        • agroecological performance 1 -- measurement of farming system sustainability across multiple dimensions
      • Statistical and Quantitative Methods -- Statistical analysis and quantitative research methods
        • meta-analysis 3 -- statistical method for combining results from multiple studies to assess overall effects
        • segmented regression 1 -- statistical approach dividing data into segments for improved model fit
        • bayesian inference 1 -- statistical method using prior knowledge and observed data to estimate parameters
        • multinomial ordered logit regression 1 -- statistical method for analyzing ordered categorical outcomes with multiple response levels
        • multi-criteria analysis 1 -- decision-making framework evaluating multiple competing objectives
        • multi-criteria decision-making 1 -- analytical approach for evaluating options based on multiple, often conflicting criteria
        • spatial analysis 1 -- geographic data analysis to understand spatial patterns and relationships
        • spatial analytics 1 -- analytical approaches combining geography, economics and data science for policy insights
        • geospatial analysis 2 -- examination of spatial data to understand geographic patterns and relationships
        • geospatial data analysis 1 -- spatial analysis techniques to map socio-ecological variables and inform interventions
        • spatial clustering 1 -- grouping of geographic units based on similarity of characteristics
        • spatial prioritization 1 -- geographic targeting based on spatial analysis
        • spatial targeting 2 -- geographic prioritization of interventions based on location-specific factors
        • spatial effects 1 -- influence of geographic proximity on social and economic outcomes
        • yield gap analysis 3 -- assessment of differences between potential and actual crop yields
        • policy analysis 2 -- systematic evaluation of policy options, impacts, and implementation strategies
        • policy assessment 4 -- evaluation of regulatory frameworks and their effectiveness
        • policy coherence analysis 1 -- systematic assessment of alignment and consistency across multiple policies
        • supply chain analysis 1 -- examination of production and trade networks and their impacts
        • supply chain mapping 1 -- systematic identification and analysis of food system bottlenecks and flows
        • value chain analysis 20 -- examination of production to consumption linkages and market dynamics
        • value chain mapping 2 -- systematic analysis of actors, relationships, and flows in agricultural commodity chains
        • market systems analysis 4 -- systematic examination of market structures, actors, and dynamics
        • market assessment 3 -- systematic evaluation of supply, demand, and market dynamics for specific products or sectors
        • food environment analysis 4 -- study of factors affecting food accessibility, availability, and affordability
        • food environment assessment 2 -- evaluation of food availability, accessibility, and quality in communities
        • food system analytics 3 -- data-driven analysis of food production, distribution, and consumption systems
        • dietary assessment 7 -- measurement and evaluation of food and nutrient intake patterns
        • dietary diversity assessment 2 -- measurement of variety in food consumption patterns
        • diet quality assessment 6 -- systematic evaluation of nutritional adequacy in food consumption
        • diet quality monitoring 2 -- systematic tracking and assessment of nutritional quality in food consumption patterns
        • nutritional quality assessment 2 -- evaluation of nutrient content and bioavailability in crop products
        • cost of healthy diet analysis 1 -- economic assessment of affordability and access to nutritious food
        • data gap analysis 3 -- systematic assessment to identify missing or incomplete information in databases
        • social valuation 1 -- assessment of community perceptions and willingness to adopt practices
        • randomized survey methodology 1 -- research design using random assignment to reduce bias in data collection
    • Monitoring, Evaluation, and Learning -- Frameworks and approaches for monitoring, evaluation, learning, and impact measurement
      • Monitoring and Evaluation Frameworks -- Structured approaches to monitoring and evaluating programs and interventions
        • monitoring and evaluation 8 -- systematic assessment of intervention implementation and outcomes
        • monitoring and evaluation frameworks 3 -- structured approaches to measure and assess intervention outcomes
        • theory of change 4 -- comprehensive description of how and why desired change is expected to happen
        • systems-based theory of change 1 -- impact planning approach incorporating feedback loops and system dynamics
        • adaptive management 4 -- iterative management approach that adjusts based on learning and feedback
        • impact evaluation 4 -- systematic assessment of changes caused by development interventions
        • impact assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects on outcomes
        • impact measurement 1 -- systematic tracking and assessment of climate and environmental outcomes
        • longitudinal impact assessment 1 -- long-term tracking of intervention effects over multiple time periods
        • impact pathway assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of intervention effects through causal chains
        • baseline assessment 2 -- initial measurement of conditions before intervention
        • technology assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of technology performance, functionality and adoption readiness
        • technology adoption 9 -- process by which farmers accept and implement new agricultural technologies or practices
        • technology adoption dynamics 2 -- patterns of farmer uptake and abandonment of agricultural innovations
        • adoption dynamics 1 -- patterns of technology uptake including initial use, consistent adoption, dis-adoption, and non-adoption
        • varietal adoption 8 -- process by which farmers select and use new crop varieties
        • indicator framework monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking of multiple metrics to assess food system performance
        • adaptation tracking 1 -- systematic monitoring and evaluation of climate adaptation interventions and outcomes
        • resilience assessment 1 -- evaluation of system capacity to cope with and recover from shocks
        • climate resilience assessment 4 -- systematic evaluation of systems' ability to withstand climate impacts
        • climate vulnerability assessment 3 -- systematic evaluation of exposure, sensitivity, and adaptive capacity to climate risks
        • vulnerability assessment 6 -- systematic evaluation of exposure and susceptibility to risks
        • vulnerability analysis 2 -- assessment of susceptibility to climate and environmental stresses
        • vulnerability indexing 1 -- quantitative assessment of susceptibility to adverse conditions
        • scaling readiness assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting the scaling of innovations
        • scaling assessment 1 -- systematic evaluation of factors affecting innovation adoption and diffusion
        • partnership assessment framework 1 -- systematic evaluation of breeding program capabilities and improvement needs
        • partnership health assessment 1 -- evaluation of collaboration effectiveness among institutional partners
        • training needs assessment 2 -- systematic approach to identify knowledge and skill gaps for targeted capacity building
        • breeding program assessment 4 -- systematic evaluation of breeding program effectiveness and capabilities
        • usability testing 2 -- evaluation of user interface design through task-based user feedback
        • innovation validation 1 -- systematic testing of prototypes and assumptions with real users before full implementation
        • product concept testing 1 -- evaluation of new product ideas with target users
        • video-based product concept testing 1 -- market research method using videos to test farmer preferences for hypothetical crop products
      • Remote Sensing and Digital Monitoring -- Technology-based monitoring approaches using remote sensing and digital tools
        • satellite remote sensing 8 -- use of satellite imagery and radar data to monitor agricultural systems
        • remote sensing 5 -- use of satellite or aerial imagery for agricultural monitoring
        • earth observation 6 -- use of satellite and remote sensing technologies to monitor environmental and agricultural parameters
        • earth observation integration 2 -- combining satellite data with ground-based information for agricultural monitoring
        • satellite-based crop monitoring 4 -- use of satellite imagery and vegetation indices to monitor crop development and phenology
        • satellite-based monitoring 3 -- use of satellite imagery and remote sensing for crop and weather monitoring
        • satellite monitoring 2 -- use of satellite imagery and data for agricultural and environmental monitoring
        • satellite imagery analysis 2 -- use of satellite data to monitor crop conditions and agricultural landscapes
        • drone-based monitoring 2 -- use of unmanned aerial vehicles for data collection and measurement
        • drone-based crop monitoring 1 -- use of unmanned aerial vehicles with sensors to assess crop health and growth
        • uav-based remote sensing 1 -- collection of agricultural data using unmanned aerial vehicles equipped with sensors
        • unmanned aerial vehicle surveillance 2 -- drone-based monitoring and data collection for agriculture
        • digital monitoring platform 3 -- technology-based system for tracking and verification of activities
        • digital monitoring systems 2 -- electronic platforms for tracking and reporting agricultural activities and outcomes
        • digital tracking system 3 -- technology-based monitoring and data collection system for agricultural interventions
        • integrated monitoring systems 2 -- comprehensive surveillance platforms combining multiple data sources
        • real-time monitoring system 1 -- automated data collection and analysis platform providing immediate feedback
        • digital data collection 7 -- electronic systems for gathering and analyzing information
        • digital data capture 1 -- electronic collection and recording of information using digital platforms and tools
        • iot sensor networks 2 -- interconnected sensors collecting real-time environmental and agricultural data
        • soil moisture monitoring 2 -- systematic tracking of soil water content using remote sensing or field measurements
        • soil health monitoring 2 -- systematic assessment of soil biological, chemical, and physical properties for management decisions
        • soil organic carbon monitoring 2 -- measurement and tracking of carbon content in agricultural soils
        • water quality monitoring 1 -- systematic assessment of water parameters to ensure suitability for aquaculture and other uses
        • hydrological monitoring 1 -- systematic measurement and tracking of water levels and flow in water bodies
        • agroclimatic monitoring 3 -- systematic observation and tracking of climate conditions affecting agricultural production
        • deforestation monitoring 3 -- systematic tracking of forest loss over time using remote sensing and ground data
        • drought monitoring 3 -- systematic tracking of drought conditions using indicators
        • crop monitoring 2 -- systematic observation and assessment of crop growth and conditions
        • food security monitoring 3 -- systematic tracking of food access, availability, and utilization indicators
        • market monitoring 9 -- systematic tracking and analysis of commodity prices and trade flows
        • market price monitoring 5 -- systematic tracking of commodity prices and market conditions
        • food safety monitoring 2 -- systematic surveillance of contaminants and hazards in food systems
        • agrobiodiversity monitoring 2 -- systematic tracking of crop diversity and genetic resources in food systems
        • systematic agrobiodiversity monitoring 2 -- standardized tracking of crop diversity conservation status over time and space
        • agroforestry monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking of tree planting and forest management activities
        • environmental dna monitoring 1 -- biodiversity assessment using genetic material extracted from environmental samples
        • socio-environmental monitoring 1 -- integrated assessment of social and environmental outcomes in landscapes
        • migration monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking and analysis of population movement patterns
        • heat stress monitoring 1 -- assessment of temperature impacts on livestock behavior and productivity
        • zero deforestation monitoring 1 -- tracking and verification of forest-free agricultural production
        • climate disinformation monitoring 1 -- systematic tracking and response to climate-related misinformation
        • synthetic aperture radar 3 -- remote sensing technique using radar signals to monitor surface conditions and vegetation
        • hyperspectral remote sensing 1 -- imaging technology using multiple spectral bands to detect crop conditions
        • hyperspectral imaging 1 -- advanced sensing technique analyzing light interaction across multiple wavelengths
        • multispectral image analysis 1 -- automated analysis using multiple wavelengths of light for species identification
        • crop type mapping 2 -- remote sensing identification of agricultural land use patterns
        • canopy height modeling 1 -- estimation of crop structural parameters using remote sensing or other technologies
      • Greenhouse Gas Measurement and Reporting -- Methods for measuring, reporting, and verifying greenhouse gas emissions
        • greenhouse gas measurement 12 -- quantification of emissions from agricultural systems using standardized protocols and equipment
        • greenhouse gas emission measurement 3 -- techniques to quantify agricultural emissions for climate action
        • greenhouse gas emissions measurement 2 -- quantification of carbon dioxide, methane and nitrous oxide emissions from agricultural systems
        • greenhouse gas emissions quantification 1 -- systematic measurement and assessment of agricultural greenhouse gas emissions using bottom-up approaches
        • monitoring reporting verification 7 -- framework for tracking and validating environmental compliance
        • monitoring, reporting, and verification 3 -- systems for tracking and validating climate action progress
        • monitoring reporting and verification 1 -- systematic tracking and validation of environmental and agricultural outcomes
        • emissions monitoring 4 -- systematic measurement and verification of greenhouse gas emissions from agricultural activities
        • emission monitoring systems 3 -- tools and frameworks for measuring and reporting greenhouse gas emissions from agricultural activities
        • carbon accounting 4 -- systematic measurement and tracking of carbon emissions and sequestration
        • greenhouse gas inventory 2 -- systematic accounting of emissions and removals by sources and sinks
        • greenhouse gas budgets 1 -- comprehensive accounting of anthropogenic and natural sources and sinks of greenhouse gases
        • ipcc tier 2 methodology 3 -- standardized approach for estimating greenhouse gas emissions using country-specific parameters
        • eddy covariance 1 -- micrometeorological technique for measuring ecosystem-scale carbon dioxide and water vapor fluxes
        • enteric methane measurement 1 -- direct quantification of methane emissions from livestock digestive systems under field conditions
        • emission factors 4 -- standardized coefficients used to estimate greenhouse gas emissions from activities
      • Foresight and Strategic Planning Methods -- Forward-looking analytical methods for planning and strategy
        • strategic foresight 2 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios to inform current decisions
        • foresight analysis 1 -- systematic exploration of future scenarios for strategic planning
        • food systems foresight 1 -- strategic planning methodology for anticipating future food system changes
        • participatory foresight 1 -- collaborative approach to exploring and planning for future scenarios
        • food systems leadership 2 -- leadership development and behaviors within agricultural and food system contexts
        • science of scaling 1 -- evidence-based understanding of how innovations achieve widespread adoption and impact
    • Systematic Reviews and Evidence Synthesis -- Methods for synthesizing evidence from multiple studies
      • systematic review 7 -- comprehensive review methodology using systematic search and analysis protocols
      • meta-analysis 3 -- statistical method for combining results from multiple studies to assess overall effects
      • evidence gap mapping 4 -- systematic methodology to identify and visualize gaps in research evidence
      • scoping review 1 -- systematic research method to map existing literature and identify knowledge gaps
      • evidence-based policy 6 -- policy development informed by systematic research evidence
      • evidence-based decision support 3 -- agricultural advisory systems using scientific data to guide farmer decisions
      • data harmonization 3 -- standardization of data formats and structures across systems
      • data standardization 2 -- process of converting diverse datasets into consistent, comparable formats
      • data curation 3 -- process of organizing, validating, and managing data for quality and accessibility
      • metadata standardization 1 -- establishing consistent data description and classification systems
      • metadata mining 1 -- automated extraction and organization of dataset descriptions for improved data integration
      • data interoperability 1 -- enabling different systems to exchange and use data effectively
      • fair data principles 1 -- data management standards ensuring findable, accessible, interoperable, and reusable datasets
      • federated data sharing 1 -- collaborative data sharing framework that maintains data sovereignty while enabling analysis
      • data integration platform 1 -- unified system combining multiple data sources
    • Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence Methods -- AI, machine learning, and computational methods applied in agricultural research
      • Core AI and ML Approaches -- Foundational machine learning and AI methods
        • machine learning 8 -- computational methods that learn patterns from data for prediction
        • machine learning modeling 7 -- use of algorithms that learn from data to make predictions or classifications
        • machine learning algorithms 2 -- computational methods that learn patterns from data for prediction or classification
        • machine learning workflows 1 -- automated processes for data analysis and model deployment using artificial intelligence
        • machine learning integration 1 -- combining machine learning algorithms with process-based models to improve agricultural predictions
        • machine learning classification 1 -- automated pattern recognition for categorizing biological materials
        • machine learning forecasting 6 -- artificial intelligence techniques applied to predict agricultural outcomes and resource needs
        • machine learning phenotyping 1 -- use of computational algorithms to automatically assess plant traits from sensor data
        • deep learning 2 -- machine learning approach using neural networks for pattern recognition
        • deep learning detection 3 -- artificial intelligence approach for automated pattern recognition
        • artificial intelligence 11 -- computer systems performing tasks that typically require human intelligence
        • artificial intelligence modeling 1 -- computational approach using AI algorithms for agricultural applications and data analysis
        • artificial intelligence integration 1 -- incorporation of AI technologies to enhance service delivery and decision-making
        • generative artificial intelligence 2 -- ai systems capable of creating new content including text, images, or recommendations based on training data
        • large language models 4 -- AI systems for processing and generating human-like text responses
        • computer vision 4 -- artificial intelligence technique that enables machines to interpret and analyze visual information
        • computer vision phenotyping 1 -- automated plant trait measurement using image analysis algorithms
        • transfer learning 1 -- machine learning approach applying knowledge from one domain to another
        • random forest classification 1 -- machine learning algorithm for image classification and pattern recognition
        • named entity recognition 1 -- natural language processing technique to identify and classify named entities in text
        • vision-language models 1 -- AI systems that process both visual and textual information
        • automatic speech recognition 3 -- technology that converts spoken language into text for digital applications
        • image analysis 1 -- automated processing and interpretation of visual data
        • high-performance computing 1 -- computational infrastructure providing enhanced processing power and storage for complex data analysis
        • bias mitigation in ai 2 -- techniques to identify and reduce unfair discrimination in artificial intelligence systems
        • bias detection and mitigation 1 -- systematic identification and correction of algorithmic biases in ai systems
        • artificial intelligence ethics 1 -- principles and practices for responsible development and use of AI technologies
        • artificial intelligence famine forecasting 1 -- machine learning approaches to predict famine conditions and food crises
      • Digital Tools and Decision Support -- Digital platforms and decision support systems for agricultural research
        • decision support systems 11 -- computer-based tools providing information to aid decision-making
        • decision-support tools 4 -- digital platforms and frameworks that assist in agricultural decision-making
        • digital decision-support tools 1 -- technology platforms that provide data-driven recommendations for agricultural management
        • digital twin 8 -- real-time digital replica of physical systems for management
        • digital twin technology 3 -- digital replica of physical systems used for modeling and decision support
        • aquaculture decision support tool 3 -- multi-criteria analysis platform for aquaculture site selection and planning
        • web-gis platform 1 -- web-based geographic information system for spatial data analysis
        • open data cube architecture 1 -- structured system for organizing and accessing large spatial datasets
        • spatiotemporal asset catalog 1 -- standardized metadata specification for spatiotemporal data assets
        • spatiotemporal data cataloging 1 -- systematic organization and metadata management of spatial and temporal datasets
        • application programming interface 1 -- software interface that allows different systems to communicate and exchange data
        • digital soil mapping 5 -- use of digital tools and algorithms to map soil properties spatially
        • digital soil sensing 1 -- portable field-based technology for rapid soil property assessment
        • digital water body inventory 1 -- interactive platform mapping and managing water infrastructure using satellite data
        • digital mrv platform 1 -- technology system for monitoring, reporting and verifying environmental restoration activities
    • Scaling and Innovation Methods -- Frameworks and approaches for scaling agricultural innovations and assessing readiness
      • Scaling Frameworks and Approaches -- Structured methods for scaling agricultural innovations
        • scaling for impact 18 -- systematic approach to expanding successful innovations to achieve broader development outcomes
        • scaling pathways 12 -- systematic approaches to expand adoption of innovations
        • scaling framework 7 -- systematic approach for expanding successful interventions to broader contexts
        • scaling strategies 5 -- systematic methods for expanding successful interventions to broader populations
        • scaling readiness 5 -- systematic preparation of innovations for widespread adoption and implementation
        • inclusive scaling 4 -- strategy for expanding improved varieties that ensures broad access across different farm types and socioeconomic levels
        • adaptive scaling 2 -- approach to scaling innovations that adapts to local contexts and market conditions
        • responsible scaling 2 -- expansion of innovations while anticipating and mitigating social and environmental risks
        • producer-led scaling 4 -- farmer-driven expansion of successful practices through peer-to-peer learning
        • gender-responsive scaling 1 -- scaling strategies that integrate gender considerations and address gendered barriers
        • selective scaling 1 -- targeted expansion strategy focusing on specific contexts or beneficiary groups for improved varieties
        • participatory scaling 1 -- collaborative approach to expanding successful interventions through stakeholder engagement
        • innovation scaling 6 -- process of expanding successful agricultural innovations to broader adoption
        • scaling scan tool 1 -- assessment framework to evaluate innovation scalability potential
        • stage-gate framework 1 -- structured decision-making process with defined milestones and evaluation criteria
      • Innovation Assessment and Bundling -- Methods for assessing and packaging innovations for deployment
        • innovation bundling 5 -- integrating technical, digital and institutional solutions to address interconnected challenges
        • technology bundling 1 -- integrated package of complementary technologies and services for scaling
        • innovation package 2 -- bundled set of technologies, practices and services designed to achieve specific outcomes
        • socio-technical innovation bundles 4 -- integrated packages combining technological innovations with social interventions
        • bundled innovations 2 -- integrated packages combining multiple complementary technologies and practices
        • whole-farm innovation bundles 3 -- integrated packages of complementary technologies and practices for entire farming systems
        • integrated production bundle 4 -- coherent package of agronomic practices, inputs, and management recommendations for specific crops
        • target product profiles 13 -- systematic documentation of desired crop characteristics based on market needs
        • product profile development 3 -- defining target traits and characteristics for specific market segments
        • target product profile development 1 -- systematic definition of desired characteristics for breeding targets
        • market segmentation 11 -- division of markets based on consumer preferences and end-use requirements
        • seed product market segmentation 2 -- systematic categorization of seed markets based on standardized criteria
        • farmer segmentation 1 -- classification of farmers into distinct groups based on characteristics and preferences
        • market intelligence 11 -- systematic collection and analysis of market data to inform strategic decisions
    • Capacity Building and Learning Methods -- Approaches for building capacity, knowledge exchange, and learning in agricultural research
      • Training and Capacity Development -- Methods and approaches for training and capacity development
        • capacity building 262 -- systematic development of skills and knowledge among target beneficiaries
        • capacity development 26 -- building skills and knowledge of individuals and organizations
        • capacity strengthening 8 -- systematic development of technical and organizational abilities to implement and scale innovations
        • capacity building training 4 -- structured educational intervention to develop skills and knowledge among target participants
        • capacity development training 2 -- structured learning interventions to enhance skills and knowledge of individuals or organizations
        • training of trainers 18 -- capacity building approach that prepares participants to train others
        • stakeholder training 7 -- educational activities designed to improve stakeholder knowledge and skills
        • extension training 4 -- capacity building programs for agricultural extension workers to improve farmer outreach
        • virtual training 4 -- remote delivery of educational content and skills development
        • virtual learning 2 -- remote education delivery using digital technologies
        • e-learning 1 -- digital educational delivery method using online platforms and resources
        • experiential learning 5 -- educational approach using hands-on interactive experiences to build understanding
        • peer learning 3 -- knowledge exchange and skill development among individuals with similar experiences
        • peer learning networks 2 -- farmer-to-farmer knowledge sharing platforms for scaling innovations
        • participatory capacity building 2 -- collaborative learning processes that strengthen stakeholder skills through active engagement
        • curriculum development 3 -- systematic design and creation of educational programs and materials
        • curriculum integration 6 -- incorporation of new knowledge and practices into educational programs
        • curriculum institutionalization 1 -- formal integration of interdisciplinary courses into university academic programs
        • advocacy training 4 -- educational programs to develop skills for promoting causes and influencing policy
        • agribusiness training 3 -- education combining agricultural production with business management skills
        • financial literacy training 5 -- educational programs teaching budgeting, savings, credit management, and investment decision-making skills
        • financial management training 1 -- educational programs to develop business financial skills and practices
        • mobile phone-delivered training 1 -- educational content delivered through automated phone calls or mobile platforms
        • game-based learning 1 -- structured experiential learning using games to develop understanding and problem-solving skills
        • gamification 2 -- applying game design elements to non-game contexts to enhance engagement
        • edutainment 1 -- educational content delivery through entertainment media to engage and inform audiences
        • decolonial pedagogies 2 -- educational frameworks that challenge colonial knowledge systems and power structures
        • genomics training 1 -- capacity building in genetic analysis techniques for crop improvement and breeding programs
        • food safety training 1 -- education programs to improve food handling and safety practices
        • demonstration plot training 1 -- hands-on learning approach using field demonstrations to transfer technology
        • farmer field demonstrations 2 -- on-farm testing and showcasing of improved agricultural practices
        • farmer-led demonstration plots 3 -- on-farm trials managed by farmers for peer-to-peer learning and technology validation
      • Knowledge Exchange and Dissemination -- Methods for sharing and disseminating knowledge
        • knowledge exchange 4 -- systematic sharing and transfer of information and expertise between stakeholders
        • knowledge exchange sessions 1 -- interactive platforms for sharing and learning evidence-based practices
        • knowledge dissemination 3 -- systematic sharing of research findings and expertise across communities
        • knowledge sharing 1 -- exchange of information and expertise among stakeholders
        • knowledge diffusion 1 -- spread of agricultural information and practices through farmer networks
        • knowledge management system 1 -- platform for organizing and sharing information and experiences
        • knowledge platform 2 -- digital system for organizing, sharing and accessing information resources
        • south-south collaboration 2 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries
        • south-south cooperation 1 -- knowledge and technology exchange between developing countries for mutual development
        • community of practice 24 -- collaborative network for sharing knowledge and best practices among practitioners
        • innovation networks 7 -- collaborative platforms connecting multiple actors to facilitate knowledge exchange and scaling
        • innovation platforms 5 -- multi-stakeholder forums for collaborative problem-solving and knowledge sharing
        • innovation hubs 2 -- territorial platforms that connect actors, capacities, and knowledge for technology validation and scaling
        • territorial innovation networks 2 -- collaborative networks linking research, extension and farmers across geographic territories
        • institutional learning 1 -- systematic knowledge acquisition and application within organizations
        • capacity sharing 3 -- collaborative exchange of skills, knowledge, and resources between institutions
        • farmer-to-farmer learning 1 -- peer-to-peer knowledge exchange methods that validate farmers as sources of innovation
        • family-led learning 1 -- household-based approach to knowledge sharing and decision-making
    • Gender and Social Inclusion Methods -- Methods for integrating gender and social inclusion into agricultural research
      • Gender Research Methods -- Specific methods for gender analysis and gender-responsive research
        • gender transformative research 7 -- research approaches that challenge and transform underlying causes of gender inequalities
        • gender-responsive research 2 -- research design that considers differential impacts and needs of men and women
        • gender-sensitive measurement 1 -- evaluation framework incorporating gender equality considerations
        • gender norms measurement 1 -- quantitative tools for assessing and tracking changes in gender-related social norms
        • gender norms analysis 1 -- systematic examination of social expectations and roles that limit participation and decision-making
        • gender action learning system 1 -- participatory empowerment tool addressing gender inequities in development
        • women's empowerment in agriculture index 2 -- standardized tool for measuring women's empowerment in agricultural contexts
        • gender productivity gap 1 -- difference in agricultural productivity between male and female farmers
        • intra-household allocation 1 -- distribution of resources among household members
        • intrahousehold decision-making 1 -- distribution of decision-making power and preferences within households
        • intra-household information sharing 1 -- flow of knowledge and data between members within farming households
        • gendered labor response 2 -- differential impacts of external shocks on men's and women's work patterns
        • intersectionality 2 -- analysis considering multiple overlapping social identities and systems of oppression
        • feminist political ecology 1 -- analytical framework examining gender, power, and environmental resource access
      • Social Assessment Methods -- Methods for assessing social dimensions of agricultural interventions
        • social behavior change communication 4 -- strategic communication approach to influence behaviors and social norms
        • behavioral change communication 2 -- interventions designed to influence individual decision-making and behavior
        • behavior change communication 1 -- strategic communication approach to influence individual and community behaviors
        • behavior change model 1 -- framework for understanding and facilitating adoption of new practices through capability, opportunity, and motivation
        • behaviour change wheel 1 -- framework for understanding drivers of behavior change in agricultural adoption
        • behavioral analysis 1 -- systematic study of animal or human behavior patterns
        • behavioral interventions 1 -- psychological approaches to influence farmer decision-making
        • behavioral nudges 1 -- interventions that guide behavior through choice architecture without restricting options
        • social equity integration 3 -- ensuring marginalized groups have equal access to resources and decision-making in development programs
        • conflict sensitivity 5 -- considering peace and conflict dynamics in development interventions
        • conflict-sensitive programming 6 -- development approach that considers potential conflict risks and promotes peace-building
        • conflict classification 1 -- systematic categorization of different types of violence and conflict
        • conflict diffusion analysis 1 -- measurement of geographic spread of violence and conflict
        • political violence analysis 1 -- systematic study of organized violence and its impacts on communities
        • compound risk assessment 1 -- analysis of interconnected and cascading risks across multiple systems
        • disaster impact assessment 1 -- evaluation of natural disaster effects on livelihoods and economic outcomes
        • loss and damage assessment 1 -- quantification of climate-related losses that cannot be avoided through adaptation
        • resilience capacity index 1 -- composite measure of household or community ability to withstand and recover from shocks
        • multidimensional resilience 1 -- measurement of household capacity to withstand shocks across multiple well-being dimensions
        • subjective resilience 2 -- household-perceived capacity to anticipate, withstand, recover from, and adapt to hazards
        • energy insecurity measurement 1 -- assessment of household energy access and shortage experiences
        • food insecurity experience scale 1 -- standardized tool for measuring household food access and security
    • Miscellaneous Research Methods -- Less frequently occurring research methods and analytical approaches
      • Specialized Analytical Techniques -- Specialized laboratory and analytical methods used in agricultural research
        • near-infrared spectroscopy 1 -- analytical technique for rapid quality assessment using light absorption
        • gas chromatography 2 -- analytical technique for separating and measuring greenhouse gases
        • high-performance liquid chromatography 1 -- analytical technique for separating, identifying and quantifying compounds in mixtures
        • soil spectroscopy 1 -- analytical technique for rapid, non-destructive assessment of soil properties
        • sensory evaluation 1 -- systematic assessment of food products using human senses to determine consumer acceptance
        • nitrogen isotope analysis 2 -- scientific technique using isotopic signatures to trace nitrogen sources and transformation pathways
        • metabolomic profiling 2 -- comprehensive analysis of small molecules and metabolites in biological samples
        • metabolomic analysis 1 -- comprehensive study of metabolites in biological samples
        • population genetics analysis 1 -- study of genetic variation and structure within pathogen or crop populations
        • phylogenetic analysis 1 -- study of evolutionary relationships between organisms using genetic data
        • bioinformatics analysis 1 -- computational methods for analyzing biological data, particularly genomic sequences
